programme.title: Mission: Impossible: A Ghost Story
programme.desc: Andrew Duggan guest stars as Justin Bainbridge, a multimillionaire paranoid militarist, whose son, Howard, defected behind the Iron Curtain with the formula to a lethal nerve gas he had developed in "A Ghost Story"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Party
programme.desc: The whereabouts of a list of enemy agents operating in the United States are locked in the memory of a captured spy, Col. Vanin (guest star Frank Marth), and no one, including the spy, can penetrate his mind in "The Party"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blind
programme.desc: An F.B.I. man is blinded while investigating a crime syndicate attempting to take over a large chemical plant. Jim Phelps undergoes a delicate eye operation so as to appear convincingly blind when he poses as the sightless man.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encore
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as an aging hoodlum who is artificially transplanted back to the 1930s and the scene of his unsolved crime.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Tram
programme.desc: The leaders of two underworld factions call a top-level meeting at a ski resort to set up a financial holding company capable of creating chaos within the national economy.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Mindbend
programme.desc: To help the IMF team break up a crime syndicate that specializes in brainwashing ex-convicts into committing political assassinations, Barney substitutes for a former prisoner looking for an operation to give himself a new appearance.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Shape-Up
programme.desc: Guest stars Gerald S. O'Loughlin and Christopher Stone portray crime syndicate bosses in charge of the waterfront who extort huge sums of money from every ship docking at a west coast port.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Miracle
programme.desc: An undercover agent is murdered while trying to intercept a huge heroin shipment in the Pacific Northwest and the IMF team is called to take over and put the dealer and his chief executioner out of business.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encounter
programme.desc: Guest star Elizabeth Ashley plays the alcoholic wife of a crime syndicate leader whose involvement in an intimidation racket and the cold-blooded murder of an employee puts the IMF team on his trail.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Underwater
programme.desc: Stolen gems worth seventy-five million dollars scheduled to be fenced to an underworld figure suddenly disappear and the ship on which they were being transported is blown up at sea bringing the IMF team into the picture.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Invasion
programme.desc: Guest star Kevin McCarthy plays the role of a highly-placed Defense Department advisor who has murdered an Air Force official and sold vital top-secret material about America's nuclear defenses to foreign powers.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blues
programme.desc: Barney poses as a prospective rock-music recording artist to get evidence linking an organized crime figurehead played by guest star William Windom to the sudden death of a beautiful recording star who was being blackmailed by the syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Visitors
programme.desc: Guest star Steve Forrest plays the role of a millionaire publisher and communications tycoon who has sold fifty-one percent of his empire to an underworld crime syndicate which gives them a powerful influence over state politics.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Nerves
programme.desc: Christopher George guest stars in the role of a psychotic ex-convict determined to wreak vengeance on society.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Run for the Money
programme.desc: Guest stars Richard Jaeckel and Herbert Edelman play gangsters who try to get control of all the illegal betting parlors in the country as well as a virtual takeover of all thoroughbred horse racing.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Connection
programme.desc: Jim Phelps and his IMF team are given the assignment of breaking an underworld ring attempting to set up one of the world's largest drug manufacturing plants off the coast of Africa.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bride
programme.desc: Casey poses as a young peasant girl from Europe imported to be the bride of Joe Corvin, the top man at getting underworld millions into Swiss banks.

programme.title: The Rewrite
programme.desc: Keith Michaels vant priser for manuset sitt til filmen "Paradise Misplaced". Men han holder på å bli vraket i Hollywood og blir derfor tvunget til å ta en jobb han hater for å få sitt gjennombrudd: Han må undervise.

programme.title: About Us
programme.desc: Et ungt par ønsker å få kjærligheten tilbake og reiser til stedet der de tilbrakte bryllupsreisen åtte år tidligere. De kjemper sammen for å nå hverandre igjen. Det hele kulminerer i en hjerteskjærende finale når skjulte sannheter kommer for en dag.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Country-sangerinnen Charlotte vender tilbake til Tennessee før hun gifter seg. Når hun møter ungdomskjærligheten, blir noe levende og hun stiller spørsmål ved alt.

programme.title: Odd Man Rush
programme.desc: Odd Man Rush er basert på Bill Keenans bestselgende, komiske selvbiografi af samme navn. Den amerikanske ishockeyspiller Bobby Sanders fra Harvard blir solgt til en div. 1. klubb i Sverige for en vaskemaskin.

programme.title: Falling In Love
programme.desc: Frank og Molly møtes under julehandelen. Dette korte øyeblikket vil forandre livene deres, når de gjenkjenner hverandre på toget hjem måneder senere og har en fin tid sammen.

programme.title: Wings Of The Dove
programme.desc: When a beautiful young society woman must choose between a life of privilege and poverty, she befriends an heiress whose own tragic secret offers an irrestible, but dangerous, solution to her dilemma in this intriguing story of forbidden love.

programme.title: No Stranger Than Love
programme.desc: Hva er merkeligere enn det store hullet som åpner seg i Lucy Sherringtons stuegulv. Kjærligheten, virker det som.

programme.title: The Female Brain
programme.desc: Den strenge nevroforskeren Julias dypdykk i hvordan den kvinnelige og den mannlige hjernen jobber. Men Julias standhaftige oppfatninger blir utfordret når en kjekk ny deltaker melder seg til prosjektet hennes.

programme.title: Elizabethtown
programme.desc: Den fremadstormende designeren Drew Baylor får livet snudd på hodet en skjebnesvanger dag. På vei til Elizabethtown møter Drew Claire, som har bestemt seg for at hun er den rette jenta for å vise Drew veien hjem igjen.

programme.title: Midnight in Paris
programme.desc: Paris om morgenen er vakker. Paris om ettermiddagen er sjarmerende. Paris om kvelden er fortryllende. Men - Paris etter midnatt er magisk!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Queen of the Nile
programme.desc: Columnist Jordan Herrick is startled to learn that a famous movie actress hasn't aged in years. Intrigued, he investigates... and soon learns a terrifying secret.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Old Man in the Cave
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.
programme.sub-title: The Old Man in the Cave

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Night Call
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls haunt a disabled woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Most Unusual Camera
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dead Man's Shoes
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Howling Man
programme.desc: Seeking refuge from a storm, traveler David Ellington comes upon a bizarre hermitage of monks, who have imprisoned a man who begs for his help. When David confronts the head monk Brother Jerome, he is told that the man is the devil, and David must decide

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Big Tall Wish
programme.desc: An over-the-hill boxer gets a boost from one of his biggest fans - a little boy with an unwavering belief in magic.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The After Hours
programme.desc: A woman discovers that the floor of a department store, on which she bought a gold thimble, doesn't exist - and that her 'saleslady' is really a mannequin!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The After Hours
programme.desc: A woman discovers that the floor of a department store, on which she bought a gold thimble, doesn't exist - and that her 'saleslady' is really a mannequin!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Sing the Body Electric
programme.desc: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Jungle
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Sing the Body Electric
programme.desc: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Jungle
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nightmare as a Child
programme.desc: Schoolteacher Helen Foley finds a strange and very serious little girl on the stairs outside her apartment. The little girl seems to know her and tries to jog her memory about a man she saw earlier that day. The man arrives at Helen's door…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Sounds and Silences
programme.desc: A man's wish to listen to loud noise backfires.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Piano in the House
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mr. Dingle, the Strong
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: King Nine Will Not Return
programme.desc: A pilot of a downed WW II bomber comes to in the African desert and desperately tries to find out what happened to the rest of his crew.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The 7th is Made Up of Phantoms
programme.desc: Three National Guardsmen explore the site of Custer's Last Stand and encounter mysterious phenomenon that hint at the original battle occurring just out of sight.
programme.sub-title: The 7th is Made Up of Phantoms

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Steel
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Escape Clause
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: One More Pallbearer
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trade-Ins
programme.desc: An elderly couple visit the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Shot an Arrow into the Air
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately, they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.
programme.sub-title: I Shot an Arrow into the Air

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Little People
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Invaders
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Monsters are Due on Maple Street
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.
programme.sub-title: The Monsters are Due on Maple Street

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nick of Time
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Obsolete Man
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hitch-Hiker
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Third From the Sun
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Deaths-Head Revisited
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Kick the Can
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Ruins
programme.desc: "The Ruins" følger en vennegjeng som må kjempe for livet etter at de besøker en avsidesliggende arkeologisk utgraving i den meksikanske jungelen, der de oppdager noe dødelig som lever i ruinene.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Tech, Drugs, and Rock 'n Roll - Part 2
programme.desc: Team Scorpion er i et kappløp mot tiden for å demontere dødsfellen og finne kvinnen som dopet Walter før noen blir alvorlig skadet.
programme.sub-title: Tech, Drugs, and Rock 'n Roll - Part 2

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Crazy Train
programme.desc: Teamet må stoppe en sabotert løpsk T-banetog med Paige og Ralph om bord. Toby har sin første boksekamp i sitt forsøk på å imponere Happy.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Area 51
programme.desc: For å hjelpe til med å finansiere Walters forskning for å redde søsterens liv, tar Team Scorpion en lukrativ jobb for CIA for å finne et topphemmelig fly i det mystiske Area 51.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: US vs. UN vs. UK
programme.desc: Team Scorpion blir utpresset til å bryte seg inn i FN for å hjelpe til med attentatet på en truende våpenhandler. Dessuten gjør Sylvester et dristig trekk for å beskytte Megans ønsker.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Arrivals and Departures
programme.desc: Når teamet og Walters foreldre besøker Megan på sykehuset mens helsen hennes blir dårligere, blir de satt i karantene etter at et dødelig sopputbrudd truer med å infisere alle.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Old College Try
programme.desc: Team Scorpion går undercover på et universitet for å finne en hacker som infiltrerer Federal Reserve og truer med å kollapse verdensøkonomien.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Dam Breakthrough
programme.desc: På julaften må Team Scorpion forhindre en katastrofe når styrtregn skaper en stor sprekk i en demning, som truer med å utslette en hel by i dens kjølvann.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: White Out
programme.desc: For å redde en amerikansk spesialstyrkeenhet fra en sikker død, må Team Scorpion trosse bitende minusgrader i Antarktis.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sun of a Gun
programme.desc: Sylvester står ansikt til ansikt med sin fraværende far, en pensjonert general, som ber Team Scorpion om hjelp, overbevist om at en diktator i Afrika har funnet et masseødeleggelsesvåpen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Da Bomb
programme.desc: Team Scorpion har i oppgave å hjelpe NASAs topphemmelige rakettoppskyting, men de må sabotere sitt eget oppdrag når Walters date fra forrige kveld har en bombe festet til brystet hennes.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Fractured
programme.desc: Etter at et kraftig jordskjelv rammer Los Angeles, må Team Scorpion fikse en fastklemt gassledning for å forhindre en massiv eksplosjon.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Adaptation
programme.desc: Mens Team Scorpion jobber for å stoppe en tilstrømning av narkotika som blir smuglet inn i landet via droner, gir Walter Happy og Toby et ultimatum for deres nye forhold.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Fast and the Nerdiest
programme.desc: Teamet må infiltrere en eksklusiv bilsmuglingsoperasjon som er i ferd med å sende biovåpen til Sør-Amerika.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Ticker
programme.desc: Når blodforsyningen til Los Angeles blir hacket og ansett som ubrukelig, må Team Scorpion finne den skyldige og redde en ung jente som desperat trenger en hjertetransplantasjon.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: Cabe blir tatt til fange under et hemmelig oppdrag i Djibouti sammen med sin nye Homeland-protégé Tim Armstrong, og Team Scorpion må redde ham.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Twist and Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpions oppdrag for redde restene av falne marinesoldater i Vietnam er truet sammen med livet deres når en dødelig tornado kommer direkte mot dem.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Teamet blir hyret av forsvarsdepartementet for å bryte seg inn i Fort Knox og "stjele" en dyrebar gjenstand for å teste sikkerheten deres.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion drar til Tsjernobyl for å reparere den forefallende atomreaktoren før en katastrofal nedsmelting, men må også redde Sylvester og Paige når de blir fanget inne.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Toby or Not Toby
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må være smartere enn deres ustabile eks-Scorpion-medlem, Mark Collins, etter at han kidnapper Toby og truer med å drepe ham med mindre hans utspekulerte krav blir oppfylt.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: More Civil War
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må legge problemene til side når anonyme hackere med ukjente motiver tar kontroll over amerikanske militærfly og krigsskip og retter våpen mot amerikanske byer.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You
programme.desc: Akkurat i det teamet gjør fremskritt mot hackerne som kontrollerer amerikanske krigsskip, får de vite at en amerikansk atomubåt også er blitt hacket.
programme.sub-title: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Når Walter ved et uhell blir skutt ut i verdensrommet i en rakett, hallusinerer han om Paige mens oksygenet hans går tom, og Team Scorpion jobber febrilsk for å finne en måte å få ham hjem før han blir kvalt.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 604
programme.desc: Stine og Daniel lengter etter mer plass før de snart utvider familien fra tre til fire. Derfor er det ikke optimalt når Mads ringer og forteller at avtalen med det nye huset deres i Langå ikke gjelder.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: Astrid og Steffen skal kjøpe sitt første hus, men de kan ikke gå på kompromiss med ønskene sine. De møter programmets eksperter som skal kjøpe et hus på deres vegne.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Ekspertene drar til Hørning, der presten og hennes familie trenger et nytt sted å bo. De leier et lite rekkehus og nå vil de gjerne flytte.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anna Thora og Jonas har to små barn - og en drøm om å bo sammen med besteforeldrene. Så ekspertene leter etter et hus som har plass til to familier, med plass til alle og deres behov.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: Anne Sofie og Paw har ikke nok plass i den lille Frederiksberg-leiligheten etter en familieøkning. Men kravene til drømmehuset er store, så selv med 7 millioner finner de ikke det de er ute etter.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Louise og Jonas fra Viborg drømmer stort, men drømmen faller i bakken med et brak. Ekspertene må jobbe hardt før den lille familien - forhåpentligvis - kan flytte inn i drømmehuset.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 502
programme.desc: Anita og Martins to barn har tatt over hjemmet, og det er leker overalt. Løsningen er et større hjem, men paret har ikke klart å finne det rette huset enda. Nå får de hjelp av ekspertene, men det blir ikke lett.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Halmstad
programme.desc: In Halmstad Tareq explores the contrast between the busy summer scene at the beach and the quiet rural country life, meeting Jörgen Persson: award winning table tennis player and visiting a village famous for its cheese.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kemi
programme.desc: Kemi is situated in northern Finland by the Bothnian Bay and it is part of Lapland region. Tareq tries his luck at a spot of burbot fishing on the frozen sea and visits the snow castle hotel.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Situated on the west coast of Sweden, Bohuslän is a place where you can really feel the history of fishing all around a tradition that is still active. Tareq will be harvesting supreme quality oysters and lobsters and cook some wonderful seafood dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Florø
programme.desc: Tareq visits Norway and Florø to celebrate their national day -17th of May. Surrounded by breathtaking archipelagos and stunning fjords he dives for scallops in the north sea, cooking at mountain peaks and exploring the history of norwegian salmon

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia
programme.desc: Tareq makes his way across the baltic sea to Estonia and the capital Tallinn. He discovers the historical treasures of the city and its thriving culinary life before he heads out into the vast and beautiful countryside and the national park of Soomaa.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Ringkøbing
programme.desc: Ringkøbing, a lovely old market town located at the west coast of Denmark. Here, Tareq visit a traditional Herring Festival and meets up with local entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever-changing environment.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Falkenberg
programme.desc: Something is definitely happening in Falkenberg on the west coast of Sweden. Over the last couple of years it have become somewhat of a haven for foodies. Tareq is on a mission; taking him through a fertile landscape with vineyards and salmon fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Öland
programme.desc: Tareq bikes through the unique landscape of Öland, Sweden's second largest island located in the Baltic Sea. It is a place where the interaction between man and nature have created a diverse and rich farmland with an amazing amount of small producers.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Bornholm, the sunny bright green island with it’s own gastronomic tone is a true pioneer when it comes to local food at it’s finest quality. Tareq visit Denmark's first regional food culture house where they develop this unique flourishing cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Laponia
programme.desc: In the northern part of Sweden, you’ll find the stunning world heritage Laponia. Almost 10.000 square kilometres of nature reserves and national parks. Tareq visit the rich, unique culture of the sami in the vast impressive wilderness.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö & Copenhagen
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor returns to his home turf to see what has happened and what the future might bring to the new nordic cuisine. He visits a local goat farmer and meets up with young enthusiastic chefs who takes this nordic legacy further.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Zealand
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor visits the South Coast of Denmark to make his own versions of open-faced sandwiches and smoked fish dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Dalsland
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor puts on his hiking boots and explores the pilgrim trail of Dalsland in West Sweden. This episode will include outdoor cooking, foraging and beaver safari.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lolland
programme.desc: When Michelin star chefs move from Copenhagen to the countryside, they often end up in Lolland/Falster. Here Tareq will meet Claus Meyer the father of new nordic cuisine and other entrepreneurs that opened interesting restaurants here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Skåne
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor explores his own backyard of Skåne and hometown of Malmö, a multi cultural food mix. Here you can find food and culture from all over the world that makes it a unique culinary destination.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Läckö & Kinnekulle
programme.desc: By Lake Vänern you find Läckö and Kinnekulle, an area rich in history, culture and traditions. Tareq cooks exciting dishes on vendice roe, fish and local cheeses - all served on porcelain from the world-famous Rörstrand.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Sjuhärad
programme.desc: Sjuhärad is nature and culture in perfect symbiosis. Tareq takes the bike to meet some of the food entrepreneurs in the area who have started exciting new businesses. Here you live close to nature, forest and lakes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Greater Copenhagen
programme.desc: Copenhagen and Skåne are a hot food destinations. Tareq visits Østergro, Denmark's first "rooftop farm" in the middle of Copenhagen, Eden in the new district Hyllie, Malmö and Häckeberga Castle where there will be wild boar for dinner.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Höganäs
programme.desc: The wild coast at Kullaberg in Skåne has a lot of culture and gastronomy to offer. Fantastic ceramics, vineyards and world-class ice cream. Tareq visits VikenTomater and cooks vegetarian ragù

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Karlstad
programme.desc: Tareq visits sunny Karlstad! Here, food is prepared by Vänern's shores and in Värmland's deep forests. Butter-fried Zander, crepes and cooking over an open fire are on the menu.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of (Part 2)
programme.desc: Once again, Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lund
programme.desc: In this episode, Tareq visits Lund, a thousand-year old city in southern Sweden. Lund is surrounded by the richest farmland in the country, and we explore nearby islands and meet entrepreneurs making highly-regarded local products.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Tareq sails out to Bornholm, a Danish island close to southern tip of Sweden. The islanders are fiercely self-sufficient and this attitude reflects in the huge number of food producers making products that are sold both locally and internationally.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Jokkmokk
programme.desc: Far above the Arctic Circle, Tareq explores the wild country around Jokkmokk. Here, the Sami people lived from what the land provides for thousands of years. This wild cuisine is as extreme as the weather here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, Åland’s shipping fleet was the envy of navies around the world, and their sea trade was encouraged by the seafood, grains and fruits that thrive on these islands. Tareq prepares recipes to reflect Åland’s unique cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö
programme.desc: Tareq is in his hometown of Malmö – Sweden’s third largest city. The food scene here is inspired by the traditional seafood dishes and the large immigrant population whose recipes have given Malmö a new energy.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Storkar
programme.desc: I avslutningen av sesong to må Don og teamet stoppe en mistenkt seriemorder som doper ned og dreper unge kvinner. JoBeth Williams spiller den avdødde Margaret Eppes, og Olympia Dukakis spiller Charlotte Yates, moren til en av de mistenkte.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team hunt down a 30-year-old teacher and her 17-year- old boyfriend who are on a crime spree from Indiana to Los Angeles, on part one of a two-part third season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Desperate to rescue their fellow agent, Don and his team close in on finding Megan, who is being held hostage by a disturbed teacher (Kim Dickens) on a vicious crime spree, on part two of the two-part season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team must determine if a shooting on the freeway was a random act of violence or the work of a serial killer preying on the citizens of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a painting worth millions of dollars is stolen from a museum just before it is to go on tour, Don and his team must track down the thief, believing it is part of an insurance scam.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When an interpreter working for the Chinese consulate is killed in an apparent hit and run accident, Don and his team uncover an unlikely connection to the Department of Justice.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When Don and his team investigate a murder at a horse track, they stumble onto more than just a plot of betting on fixed races. Aya Sumika ("The O.C.") begins her recurring role as agent Liz Warner, Don's former trainee.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a series of blackouts occur in power stations leaving Los Angeles in the dark, Don and his team must determine if it is an accident or the work of terrorists.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team investigate the death of a minor league baseball player to determine if it was an accidental overdose of steroids or a homicide.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team investigate a trail of illegal waste disposal after a sinkhole, which collapses in a school playground, kills an elderly woman and injures several children. Kathy Najimy joins the cast in a recurring role as Charlie's new boss.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: During the murder investigation of a state senator, Don and his team discover a plot to exact revenge on the individuals involved in a government sponsored behavior modification project.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and Charlie try to catch a serial killer who is seeking revenge against internet sexual predators who prey on young girls they meet in chat rooms. Apollo 11 Astronaut Buzz Aldrin guest-stars as himself.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team search for the fundamentalist leader of a polygamous sect who is on the FBI's most wanted list for committing numerous crimes, including rape and murder.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a multi-million dollar racing yacht sinks during a race, Don and his team are called to investigate after the treasure hunt to find the wreckage turns deadly.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team investigate a rash of deadly restaurant robberies. During the investigation, the FBI discovers that the thieves steal the restaurant customer's credit cards so that they can run up charges at a fake internet store.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the FBI re-open a 17-year-old unsolved case when the badge of a missing LAPD officer, who is presumed dead, is found at a construction site.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a competitive mixed-martial arts fighter dies suspiciously in the ring while training for a championship match, the victim's sparring partner, who also happens to be friends with David, becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While Don is unreachable at a therapy session, the FBI and Charlie try to find the son of a music mogul whose kidnapper threatens to kill the boy if he is not paid a multi-million dollar ransom in one hour.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Charlie tries to connect a series of murders to a voter fraud conspiracy and must track down who benefits the most from the rigged elections before more people die.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a small plane mysteriously crashes, Charlie tests the flight computer and uncovers the truth behind what brought the plane down.

programme.title: Deconstructing Harry
programme.desc: På randen av et nervøst sammenbrudd stormer Lucy inn i leiligheten til Harry Block med de alvorligste hensikter. Harrys tidligere svigerinne er rasende over at han har brukt deres hemmelige forhold som råstoff til sin siste bestselgerroman.

programme.title: Fantomet
programme.desc: Historien begynner når en ekspedisjon går i land på øya Bengalla på leting etter Tougandas hodeskaller. Med sin evne til å styre energi kan de bli en katastrofe for menneskeheten.

programme.title: Asteroid
programme.desc: En mann flytter med kona og datteren fra storbyen til sitt drømmehus i utkanten av en småby, langt unna all kommunikasjon. Timingen kunne imidlertid vært bedre da det viser seg at verden holder på å kollapse.

programme.title: Murder!
programme.desc: En jurymedlem i en mordrettssak stemmer for å dømme, mens de andre jurymedlemmene har andre tanker og begynner å etterforske på egenhånd før henrettelsen.

programme.title: Wagons East
programme.desc: De var ute etter gull, men nå tar de til takke med innlagt vann. John Candy og Richard Lewis spiller i dette hysterisk ukonvensjonelle blikket på den legendariske ville vesten.

programme.title: Mrs Henderson Presents
programme.desc: En eksentrisk enke åpner et teater med dristige revyforestillinger, som utfordrer moralen i et krigsherjet 1930-talls London.

programme.title: Wim Wenders Collection: Far Away So Close
programme.desc: En gruppe engler i den tyske hovedstaden ser med lengsel på menneskers liv.

programme.title: Tucker: The Man And His Dream
programme.desc: En bildesigner utfordrer hele bilindustrien med sine revolusjonerende bildesign.

programme.title: Lost River
programme.desc: Lost River foregår i et surrealistisk drømmelandskap i en forsvinnende by. Billy (Christina Hendricks), en enslig mor med sine to sønner bor her. Billy er arbeidsledige og har ikke nok penger til å beholde huset sitt.

programme.title: Cheers NO: A Kiss Is Still a Kiss
programme.desc: Rebecca mener at sjefen hennes har fått feil inntrykk av henne, og for å rette på det ber hun Sam om å bli med henne på et jobbarrangement.
programme.sub-title: A Kiss Is Still a Kiss

programme.title: Cheers NO: My Fair Clavin
programme.desc: Cliff hjelper kjæresten sin med å forbedre utseende sitt, men angrer når hun får oppmerksomhet fra alle kanter, også fra Sam.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Christmas Cheers
programme.desc: Julaften blir en trist affære i baren etter at Rebecca ber alle om å jobbe sent.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Woody for Hire Meets Norman of the Apes
programme.desc: Woody prøver å overbevise vennene sine om at han har fått en rolle i en TV-serie.
programme.sub-title: Woody for Hire Meets Norman of the Apes

programme.title: Cheers NO: And God Created Woodman
programme.desc: Woody tar på seg skylden da Rebecca knuser en vase på en firmafest, og han ender opp som kompis med sjefen.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Tale of Two Cuties
programme.desc: Til Rebeccas store forargelse ansetter Mr. Drake en pen, ung kvinne som bartender på Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Yacht of Fools
programme.desc: Evan Drake inviterer Rebecca og Sam til å tilbringe en helg om bord i båten hans.

programme.title: Cheers NO: To All the Girls I've Loved Before
programme.desc: Frasiers utdrikningslag utvikler seg til en dyster feiring.
programme.sub-title: To All the Girls I've Loved Before

programme.title: Cheers NO: Let Sleeping Drakes Lie
programme.desc: Rebecca blir tatt på fersk gjerning på Evan Drakes soverom.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Airport V
programme.desc: Carla får hjelp av Frasier til å overvinne flyskrekken. Rebecca venter i spenning på et besøk fra en restaurantkritiker.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Sam in the Gray Flannel Suit
programme.desc: Rebecca blir sjalu når Sam blir forfremmet, helt til hun får vite årsaken til forfremmelsen.
programme.sub-title: The Sam in the Gray Flannel Suit

programme.title: Cheers NO: Our Hourly Bread
programme.desc: Woody foreslår for Rebecca at de lodder ut en ferie i Karibien for å få baren ut av det økonomiske uføret.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Slumber Party Massacred
programme.desc: Etter at Carla får vite at hun snart skal bli bestemor, inviterer Lilith og Rebecca henne på overnattingsfest for å muntre henne opp.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Bar Wars
programme.desc: Gjengen på Cheers går til krig mot en rivaliserende bar.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Big Kiss-Off
programme.desc: Sam og Woody inngår et veddemål om hvem som klarer å kysse Rebecca først.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Backseat Becky, Upfront
programme.desc: Rebecca prøver desperat å få Evan Drake på tomannshånd før han flytter til Japan.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca får seg en overraskelse når Sam blir utnevnt til sjef på Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca forteller Sam at hun heretter bare vil være sammen med eldre menn som kan fremme hennes karriere, men så møter hun sin unge, nye sjef.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam reiser til Mexico for å åpne en ny bar, mens Rebecca prøver å avslå sjefens frieri.
programme.sub-title: One Happy Chappy in a Snappy Serape

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carla mistenker Eddie for å flørte med en annen kvinne.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Norm har blitt interiørarkitekt, men prøver å holde det hemmelig.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Cliff endrer personlighet etter et sykehusopphold. Sam prøver å lære Lilith å kjøre bil.
programme.sub-title: How to Win Friends and Electrocute People

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Gjengen på Cheers bestemmer seg for å begynne med fallskjermhopping.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam er tiltrukket av en ekskjæreste og hennes voksne datter. Woody stiller opp som klovn i bursdagsselskapet til sjefens sønn.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: De ansatte på Cheers konkurrerer mot sine erkerivaler i baren Gary’s Old Towne Tavern om hvem som lager byens beste Bloody Mary.
programme.sub-title: Bar Wars II: Woodman Strikes Back

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca tilbyr seg å passe huset for en av styremedlemmene i firmaet, men hun må be Sam og Woody om hjelp når hun mister mannens høyt elskede hund.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Cliffs lojalitet blir satt på prøve da hans nye kjæreste, som også jobber på posten, begår et regelbrudd på hans vegne.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Woody bestemmer seg for å stjele kjæresten til en snobbete riking etter at han fornærmer ham.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Lilith og Frasier får øvd seg på foreldrerollen når de er barnevakt for Carlas veslevoksne sønn.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam prøver så godt han kan å holde tritt med sin unge, sportsgale kjæreste. Rebecca prøver å imponere sjefen ved å reklamere for Norms malerfirma.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Lilith overtaler Frasier til å gi avkall på det urbane liv og flytte til en hytte i skogen.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca anklager den amerikanske forsvarssjefen for å ha stjålet diamantøredobbene hennes.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam later som han er impotent for å bli bedre kjent med en kollega av Lilith og Frasier

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Den rike kjæresten til Woody setter ikke pris på den billige bursdagpresangen hun får av ham. Rebecca fornyer seg for å øke sine karrieremuligheter.

programme.title: Cops: Up for Sainthood
programme.desc: Officers pursue two juveniles involved in a carjacking. Two men sitting in a truck are spotted hiding something in the console. A man claims he took drug paraphernalia from kids as a good samaritan.

programme.title: Cops: Beer Run
programme.desc: A carjacking results in a chase and a flipped vehicle. Suspects crash a truck after attempting to steal beer. A man attempts to swallow his drugs during a bust.

programme.title: Cops: Petrol Heist
programme.desc: Officers wrestle an uncooperative driver to the ground after a traffic stop. Deputies search for a man who sent threatening texts to his ex-girlfriend. Two suspects are caught stealing gas.

programme.title: Cops: Check Please!
programme.desc: Deputies confront an intoxicated man who threatened a restaurant owner. A man tells officers he can assault who he wants. Officers are called to an altercation over a sleeping bag and a backpack.

programme.title: Cops: Decorating Tips
programme.desc: Officers pursue an SUV on the freeway. Deputies are called when an agitated man armed with scissors tears up a trailer. A driver tells officers the illegal items found in his car was left by a friend.

programme.title: Cops: Hide and Go Porch
programme.desc: Officers engage in a car chase when they spot a possible robbery suspect. A man nicknamed "Danger" is tasered after assaulting several girls. Suspects bail from a vehicle and hide under a porch.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A prostitution sting leads police to uncover additional crimes . A prostitute tells deputies she wanted money to buy her daughter a birthday gift. Deputies are called to an assault at a pub.

programme.title: Cops: Alleycat
programme.desc: Officers search for a runaway suspect with a weapons charge. A man admits to having a large number of drugs during a traffic stop. Officers respond to a man with a gun in an alley.

programme.title: Cops: Victoria's New Secret
programme.desc: Deputies observe a woman stuff drugs into her bra. A mother attacks her daughter because she got married in Vegas. Officers are called when a woman is accused of stalking her friend.

programme.title: Cops: Apologies Detective
programme.desc: Officers hold a man under a car at gunpoint after a traffic stop. Officers are flagged down and directed to an arguing couple. A man apologizes to detectives for the illicit items they find.

programme.title: Cops: It's Laundry Day
programme.desc: Deputies detain a man when a gun falls from his pantleg. Deputies are called when a father spits on his son's girlfriend. Officers respond when a child is bitten by two large dogs.

programme.title: Cops: Nothing Upstairs
programme.desc: Officers pursue a motorcyclist driving erratically. Deputies find broken drug paraphernalia in a car when conducting a traffic stop. A man who beat up his girlfriend hides from officers in an attic.

programme.title: Cops: Follow Me to the River
programme.desc: A deputy jumps into a waterway to arrest a fleeing suspect. Officers respond to roommates in an argument. Officers are called when two crossdressers attack a group of women.

programme.title: Cops: Hiding the Evidence
programme.desc: A drug dealer swallows something suspicious as deputies move in to arrest him. Deputies pull over a father with his son in the car. A woman files a kidnapping report against her own boyfriend.

programme.title: Cops: Blame my Man
programme.desc: A man runs from police claiming he heard a gunshot. A woman lays the blame on her boyfriend. Officers confront a man who refuses to come down from a roof.

programme.title: Cops: My BFF Screwed Up
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a woman holding a loaded gun to her head. Officers kick in a door to halt an assault in progress. A woman driving a stolen vehicle claims it was purchased by a friend.

programme.title: Cops: Last Call Brawl
programme.desc: Deputies chase a man who flees a routine traffic stop. Deputies find drugs on a man who gives them an expired license. Officers respond to a man attacking several patrons in a bar.

programme.title: Cops: He's the Gingerbread Man
programme.desc: A man wanted for unpaid child support hides from deputies. Officers respond to a sexual predator following a minor. A man with a checkered driving record crashes his car.

programme.title: Cops: Hood Flip
programme.desc: A police chase becomes more dangerous when the hood of a stolen vehicle flips open. A purse snatcher denies robbing a woman. A limping man with a knee injury denies crashing his car into a tree.

programme.title: Cops: Dangerous Toppings
programme.desc: A jaywalker with no id bolts away from an officer. A man mixes illicit items with his pizza. A woman involved in a domestic violence call blames her monthly issues.

programme.title: Cops: No Respect these Days
programme.desc: A combative man at a fast food restaurant claims his phone was stolen. Multiple illegal items are found on a man parked on the side of the road. An intoxicated man throws an 83-year-old's walker.

programme.title: Cops: Wardrobe Clash
programme.desc: A homeless man hides from deputies in the closet of an empty house. Deputies arrive to a domestic disturbance to find two brothers fighting over a pair of sandals.

programme.title: Cops: Two Too Many
programme.desc: A man fights with his wife over a haircut, then leads police on a car chase. A woman gets violent with her boyfriend and then calls the police on him.

programme.title: Cops: Finding Fido
programme.desc: A drunk man threatens both firefighters and the police. Police are called over a dispute regarding an alleged missing dog. A man is found pinned under his drunk friend's car.

programme.title: Cops: Poolwatch
programme.desc: Deputies taser a man who almost ran over a deputy with his truck. A man gives police false information after saving a boy who fell into a pool. A woman tries to buy drugs from an undercover officer.

programme.title: Cops: Gimme a Break
programme.desc: Officers pursue two brothers after an attempted bank robbery. A confused man with a shotgun calls police after hearing voices. Deputies find illegal items in the back of a man's truck.

programme.title: Cops: Table for Two
programme.desc: Police respond to an emergency call and find a man in dire trouble. Deputies respond to an abusive husband at a local eatery. Two women try to buy narcotics from an undercover deputy during a sting.

programme.title: Cops: Candlelight Burglar
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a fight between a daughter's boyfriend and her mother. A woman lights candles after an attempted break-in. Police respond when an evicted tenant tries to reenter his old apartment.

programme.title: Cops: The Car is Mine!
programme.desc: A man locks himself in a trunk after deputies respond to a restraining order call. Deputies respond to two women arguing over the ownership of a car.

programme.title: Cops: Bike for Sale
programme.desc: A deputy pursues a man who fled from a traffic stop. A deputy chases a suspicious man leaving an apartment complex. Two men claim they are trying sell a bike during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops: She Needed a Nap
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a man involved in a carjacking. Deputies are called to an altercation between a father and son. Officers respond to an unresponsive woman lying in a roadway.

programme.title: Cops: Mamma's House
programme.desc: Deputies search for a man who ran from a traffic stop. A man being pursued tells officers he was going to his mother's house. A drunk driver won't admit to hitting a car.

programme.title: Cops: Mean Girls Times Two
programme.desc: Deputies are forced to taser a man after pursuing him into a field. A driver plays dumb when asked about the revolver under his car seat. Officers respond to two teenage girls in a fight.

programme.title: Cops: Backseat Denial
programme.desc: An officer struggles with a man reaching for something in his pocket. A man won't cop to the gun in his backseat. Police arrive on the scene when a man threatens to shoot his wife.

programme.title: Cops: An Innocent Gardener
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle that struck a police car. Two men deny the lawnmower in their truck was stolen. Deputies are called when a mother attempts to run her daughter over.

programme.title: Cops: Penalty Box
programme.desc: A man sneaking away from a bar fight clams he was chased by a truck. Deputies are called when a woman assaults people at a skating rink. A drunk man abandons his truck on train tracks.

programme.title: Cops: Pup and Rescue
programme.desc: A driver denies ownership of what police find in his car. Police conduct a narcotics sting that nets several arrests. A deputy removes a pooch from the scene of an accident.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Mannskapet på Federation-skipet Enterprise tilkalles til Nimbus III, Planeten for intergalaktisk fred. De skal forhandle over en bortføring, men får vite at kidnapperen er en slektning av Spock.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: Etter årevis med krig, nærmer Federation og Klingon-imperiet seg en fredssamling når et Klingon-skip nesten blir ødelagt i et tilsynelatende angrep fra Enterprise. Begge verdener forbereder seg på det som kan bli deres dødeligste møte så langt.

programme.title: Star Trek VII: Generations
programme.desc: Picards eneste håp for fremtiden er Nexus... og en legendarisk kaptein fra fortiden.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: Etter en episk kamp mot borgene (cybernetisk forsterkede livsformer), følger kaptein Picard og hans besetning borgene tilbake til 2000-tallet for å hindre at de endrer jordens tidslinje og den første utenomjordiske kontakten.

programme.title: Star Trek IX: Insurrection
programme.desc: Når mannskapet på Enterprise får vite om føderasjonens plott mot innbyggerne av en unik planet, starter kaptein Picard et åpent opprør.

programme.title: Star Trek: Nemesis
programme.desc: Sett kursen mot en galakse med enestående action og eventyr når kaptein Jean-Luc Picard (Patrick Stewart) og hans Starship-mannskap kjempet mot en farlig motstander... Som har en overraskende kobling til Picard!

programme.title: Star Trek I: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: Når et uidentifisert romvesen ødelegger tre kraftfulle Klingon-kryssere, vender kaptein James T. Kirk (William Shatner) tilbake til det nylig ombyggede U.S.S. Enterprise(tm) for å ta kommandoen.

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: Det er 2200-tallet. Føderasjonens U.S.S. Enterprise er på et treningsoppdrag og det virker som om admiral James T. Kirk (William Shatner) er resignert på at inspeksjonen kan bli den siste romferden i sin karriere. Men Khan er tilbake.

programme.title: Star Trek 3 - Jakten På Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirks seier over Khan og dannelsen av Genesis-planeten er tomme seiere. Spock er død og McCoy drives uforklarlig mot galskap. Så gir et overraskelsesbesøk fra Sarek, Spocks far, en forbløffende avsløring.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: In Search of SK1 - Akira Ojima Case
programme.desc: On October 13th 1996, the body of young Angélique Dumetz, 18 years old, is recovered down a ditch in Oise forest. An important clue is found on the crime scene.
programme.sub-title: In Search of SK1 - Akira Ojima Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Evelyne Boucher Case
programme.desc: On December 9th 1987, the naked body of the young Evelyne Boucher is found near Avignon. An unprecedented investigation begins making headlines.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Sylvie Darcy Case
programme.desc: On February 26th 2012, in the Yevelines. Around 11PM policemen are called for an assault in a parking lot in the forest of Saint-Lambet-des-Bois.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Hanging On Houseboat (Aubry case)
programme.desc: Dominique Aubry, a rich widow of 58, is found hanged on her barge in Neuilly. It appears that since the death of her husband on a trip to Mauritius, Dominique Aubry has been ailing.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Hanging On Houseboat (Aubry case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Only DNA Can Say - Angélique Dumetz
programme.desc: On February 23th 2017, policemen are alerted of the disapearrance of Brigitte Troadec, her husband Pascal, and their children Sébastien and Charlotte.
programme.sub-title: Only DNA Can Say - Angélique Dumetz

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Jean-Raymond Blatti Case
programme.desc: Arriving at her work, the secretary of a small firm in the suburbs of Geneva finds the body of Jean-Raymond Blatti, the company's new accountant. The man is lying in a pool of blood and, on his belly, the murderer has written \"DIRTY RAPIST\".

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)
programme.desc: Police in Strasbourg receive a startling emergency call from Doctor Jean-Louis Muller, a forensic pathologist well known in the region.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Christophe Lejard Case
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Christophe Lejard is found by his son just metres from their home. The man was shot in the head as he was getting into his car to go to work. An execution, which at first glance doesn't square with the profile of a quiet family man.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Deathly Fatal Passion At the Hotel (Villermet case)
programme.desc: The body of Nathalie Villermet, 46, manager of a small hotel and -restaurant, is found by a walker in the woods outside Paris, hidden under branches.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deathly Fatal Passion At the Hotel (Villermet case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Little Martyrship of A10: The Inass Touloub Affair
programme.desc: On August 11, 1987, the Orléans police discover the bruised corpse of a 4-year-old child behind a guardrail on the A10 motorway.
programme.sub-title: The Little Martyrship of A10: The Inass Touloub Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Céline Marchand Case
programme.desc: On May 30th 2015 in Sorinières, Yann Machand reports his wife Céline Marchand missing.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Victims of a Sadist - Cyril Koskinas Case
programme.desc: On July 19th 2004, the naked and tied up body of a woman is recovered in the Ourcq canal in Fresnes-sur-Marne. The victim is impossible to identify.
programme.sub-title: Victims of a Sadist - Cyril Koskinas Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Shadow of A Serial Killer: The Sophie Le Tan Case
programme.desc: On September 7, 2018, in Strasbourg, Sophie Le Tan is about to celebrate her 20th birthday with her family.
programme.sub-title: The Shadow of A Serial Killer: The Sophie Le Tan Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell Case
programme.desc: After an ordinary dinner, Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell suffer severe abdominal pains. Taken to hospital, the couple die several days apart. The food poisoning theory is quickly ruled out and forensic tests show the Labrells were poisoned with arsenic.
programme.sub-title: The Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Nelly Crémel Case
programme.desc: Nelly Crémel, 39, leaves her home to go jogging. Eight days later, after a vast search campaign, her body is found. There's no doubt that it's murder. The case soon ignites public opinion, even inflaming passions at the highest level of the state.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Drost Notthoff Case
programme.desc: On September 11th 2011, in Èze, near Monaco, the owner of a luxury villa discovers the lifeless hanging body of his tenant, a rich German businessman.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Jonna, som føler at magen hennes ligner et bombekrater etter en operasjon, og Christina, som har tre mislykkede operasjoner bak seg.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 703
programme.desc: Den tidligere burlesk-danseren Grethe måtte i 2011 fjerne begge brystene som en del av hennes behandling av brystkreft.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 101
programme.desc: I kveldens episode møter vi fire ofre for plastiskkirurgiske feiloperasjoner.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Siden puberteten, har Tascha vært lei av sine asymmetriske bryster og har hatt en brystoperasjon. Men Tascha fikk ikke symmetrien hun drømte om, og i dag skammer hun seg over brystene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 805
programme.desc: Som tenåring har Linette en skjev skillevegg i nesen som gir henne pustevansker. Som 21-åring får hun derfor tilbud om en neseoperasjon for å fikse problemet, men ender opp med en skjev nese.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 105
programme.desc: Sabine fant et tilbud på nettet, men måtte betale dyrt for å spare 50 prosent.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 608
programme.desc: I 2011 velger Sabina å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon. Men allerede et par dager etter operasjonen oppdager hun at brystene hennes henger.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 202
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Pernille, som føler seg fanget i sitt eget hjem, og Linda, som er så hemmet av et arr på magen at hun møter opp tidlig på jobb for å unngå å skifte med andre.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 902
programme.desc: Etter en brystoperasjon har Samantha tunge, smertefulle bryster og et skrantende forhold.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 609
programme.desc: For 21 år siden havnet Allan i en voldsom sykkelulykke. Allan er merket for livet, og til tross for flere operasjoner sitter han igjen med arr i ansiktet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Vi møter Jeanette, som føler seg som en forsøkskanin etter en rekke mislykkede operasjoner. Maria måtte fjerne implantatene sine, og er nå uten bryster. Shahin har smerter etter en ansiktsløftning.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 311
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi bl.a. Maria, som etter 11 operasjoner har fått det hun kaller verdens styggeste bryster. Rose fikk en bredere nese etter at hun opererte den.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi Jette, som har valgt ikke å amme sine tre barn på grunn av silikonbrystene sine, og Charlotte som fremdeles har kjøttsår på innsiden av låret etter fettsuging.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 103
programme.desc: Ivana endte ikke bare opp med å bruke en million kroner i USA, men hun ble også offer for en fatal beslutning, tatt av legene mens hun lå i narkose

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 604
programme.desc: Gjennom hele livet har 61 år gamle Lis ønsket å forandre sine små bryster. Derfor valgte hun å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon, men kort tid etter opplevde hun at det påvirket sexlivet hennes.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 903
programme.desc: Nanna har hatt flere brystoperasjoner og korrigeringer, men sitter nå igjen med deformerte, harde bryster. På grunn av operasjonene vil hun ikke at noen skal se henne naken.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi Anita som våkner opp med større bryster enn hun hadde avtalt med kirurgen og nå føler seg som en mini-versjon av Linse Kessler.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: For tre år siden valgte Sarah å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon i Polen, men etter operasjonen syntes hun brystene hennes så ut som to kaffeposer med implantater.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 613
programme.desc: Når sønnen endelig blir frisk, føler Charlott seg ikke lenger som seg selv, og hun velger derfor å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon. Men resultatet ble en stor skuffelse.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 407
programme.desc: Vi møter Maria, som etter en brystoperasjon fikk store abscesser og hull helt inn til implantatet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.
