programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gaz's Birthday
programme.desc: Geordie-gjengen er tilbake i byen for mer fest, flørt og fyll. Alle er forventningsfulle for den nye karen Aaron, og Marnie lover å holde seg unna alle gutter men havner i seng med Gaz første kveld.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Lad Code
programme.desc: Gary blir sjalu når Marnie flørter med den nye gutten Aaron. Alle er opphisset når Vicky kommer tilbake til huset, og den første 'Tash-On' - turen kommer når gjengen tanker opp med tequila på singel-kvelden.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Family's Reunited
programme.desc: Charlotte er tilbake! Og hun kunne ikke kommet på et verre tidspunkt, hun havner midt i en dobbeldate og blir klar over Garys opplegg med Marnie. Den nye karen Aaron vinner en date med Holly, men avslører at han digger Vicky.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Tash On Tours
programme.desc: Med Charlotte i hus igjen, tenker alle på Gary og Marnie og om de vil ligge sammen igjen. Gjengen tar 'Tash-On' - turer til Manchester for å vise Geordie-taktikken på singel-kveldene: Bli dritings og klin i vei.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The New Boy
programme.desc: Det spisser seg til når Aaron overhører Vicky og jentene sladre om ham samme kveld han har tredje date med Vicky. Og mens gutta jobber ute, får jentene en kjempeoverraskelse - en ny gutt, Kyle, kommer for å bli en del av familien.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: A Trip To Iceland
programme.desc: Den nye gutten Kyle gjør seg hjemmekoselig i huset gjennom å tilbringe natten med Holly, og Geordie-gjengen og deres 'Tash on Tours' blir internasjonale når de flyr til Reykjavik på Island for utagerende festing.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Marnie Exposes Gary
programme.desc: Etter å ha sjekket ut Islands gutter, jenter og geysirer, vender Geordie-gjengen tilbake til Toon. Der spisser det seg til når Aaron og Scott får høre sannheten om Gary og Marnie, og Garys tvilsomme guttekodeks.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The New Boss
programme.desc: Buzzin! Våre favorittfestløver er tilbake og alle sjokkeres av at Vicky blir sjefen deres. Holly vil ikke virke billig, derfor vil hun ikke ligge med Kyle, og Marnie dumper Aaron når hun oppdager at han har løyet for henne.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: A Party Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Holly har fest, men gutta braker sammen når Marnie prøver å gjøre Aaron sjalu ved å kline med Kyle. Sjefen Vicky arrangerer singelkveld for homofile, og Charlotte avslører at det kan bli slutt med kjæresten.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Bonjour Geordies
programme.desc: Ooh la la! Gjengen drar til Paris for en jobb med Tash-On Tours, men kan Aaron tilgi Kyle for at han kysset Marnie? Vicky blir uprofesjonelt stupfull på jobben, og når de kommer hjem, drar Charlotte for å prate med kjæresten sin.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Single Charlotte
programme.desc: Charlotte og Gary nærmer seg hverandre etter at hun kommer tilbake fra et oppgjør med kjæresten. Vicky strever med å overbevise Marnie om å ta jobben på alvor, og klørne kommer ut i en fryktelig krangel.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Marnie & Scott's Mistake
programme.desc: En utekveld i Sunderland ender i katastrofe når Aaron ser Marnie og Scott være litt mer intime enn han kan godta, og gutta skværer opp. Samtidig utvikler Charlotte og Garys forhold seg med stor styrke.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gary And The Farm Girl
programme.desc: Goerdie-gjengen drar ut på veiene for nok en Tash-On Tour for unge bønder i Gloucestershire. 'Gale Charlotte' vender tilbake når hun ser Gary prate med en annen jente, og Holly og Kyle blir mer intime enn aldri før.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Blue Skull Crew
programme.desc: Gary later som han får en tatovering av Charlottes initialer bak øret, men hun friker ut og sier noe hun angrer etterpå. Dramatikk oppstår mellom Aaron og Marnie, Holly mister tilliten til Kyle, og Gary og Scott begynner nesten å slåss.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Christmas Comes Early
programme.desc: Det er jul i Geordie Shore-huset! Men det blir tårer blant glitteret når Vicky dukker opp med triste nyheter. Kyle håper at han får en julegave fra Holly, og Gaz og Char prøver å løse sine problemer. Seriens siste episode.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Boys' Secret Pact
programme.desc: Herlig! Favorittpartyløvene er her igjen! Charlotte klekker ut en plan når hun hører om pakten mellom Gary og Aaron, men vil det ende med at hun får egg i fjeset? Imens erJames i tvil om han har en framtid i huset.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The New Arrivals
programme.desc: Det blir store forandringer i huset når James kommer med en sjokkbeskjed og to nye romkamerater dukker opp. Men nykommernes første utekveld blir spolert når det oppstår en kjempekrangel mellom Charlotte, Marnie og Holly.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gary's Big Reveal
programme.desc: Det er de nyes første morgen i huset, men hvordan skal familien samles, når Holly, Kyle og Charlotte er vekk? Holly åpner sitt hjerte for Kyle, men føler han det samme? En overraskende avsløring fra Gary knuser Charlottes hjerte.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Charlotte's Broken Heart
programme.desc: Det er dagen Charlotte har fryktet. Gary introduserer sin nye kjæreste for familien men vil Psycho Charlotte dukke opp? Imens blir Marnie og Aaron mere og mere fristet av hverandres flørting.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: King Nathan
programme.desc: Når Anna forteller Geordiene at hun har jobb til dem i et annet land, blir alle heltent! Helt til de havner på en campingplass i Wales. Marnie vil få fortalt Aaron noen sannhetens ord, noe som fører til at de ender i senga sammen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: That's How The Shore Goes
programme.desc: Ronnie slipper ut, og Snooki får trøst etter et møte med eksen. Gjengen tar farvel med The Shore, men ikke uten en siste tur i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 1 Reunion
programme.desc: Man får svar på mange spørsmål når Snooki, The Situation, Jwoww, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi og Vinny kommer tilbake for mer krangling og innsikt i hva som faktisk foregikk i strandhuset i Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Goin' South
programme.desc: Gjengen skal til Miami! Mike, Pauly D, Snooki og JWoww kjører, mens de andre tar fly. Tidligere deltaker Angelina skaper drama. Ronnie og Sammi er blitt single, men det er fortsatt komplisert.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Hangover
programme.desc: Sammi vil vite hva Ronnie gjorde på klubben kvelden før, men ingen vil si det. Angelina avbryter Paulys spill, og den vanligvis så rolige Pauly D viser en helt ny side.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Creepin'
programme.desc: Angelina ber jentene om unnskyldning. Mike, Vinny og Pauly leker med granater i boblebadet, og Ron fortsatt har hemmeligheter for Sammi.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Breaking Up
programme.desc: Sammi og Ronnie har problemer, og Sammi prøver å slå opp, men tar Ronnie tilbake etter 5 minutter. Jentene legger en plan for å fortelle Sammi sannheten om kjæresten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Letter
programme.desc: Sammi finner det 'anonyme' brevet fra Snooki og Jenni, og nå er det virkelig slutt - i hvert fall en stund. Mike, Vinny og Pauly har hendene fulle med fire jenter på én kveld.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Not So Shore
programme.desc: Det anonyme brevet skaper spenning mellom jentene, og det ender i slåsskamp. Etter enda en natt med Vinny avslører Snooki en ikke så lite kjent 'hemmelighet'.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Sleeping with the Enemy
programme.desc: Gjengen må takle konsekvensene av jentenes krangel. Angelina dater Jose fra klubben, og Jenni og Snooki kler seg i hjemmelagde beskyttelsesdrakter for å rydde opp før Snookis date.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike truer med å fortelle Jose om Angelina og Vinny. Vinnys familie kommer på besøk. Og Vinny og Pauly finner drømmejentene, men en vil få knust hjertet sitt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Dirty Pad
programme.desc: Angelina er i trøbbel når gjengen får vite at hun lå med Jose etter en natt med Vin. Men den siste dråpen kommer når Mike oppdager flere ubehageligheter på badet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Gone, Baby, Gone
programme.desc: Mike gjenforens med sin kanadiske skjønnhet, til stor underholdning for hele huset. Angelina forteller gjengen hva hun syns om dem, noe som gjør Snooki rasende og får begeret til å flyte over.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Girls Like That
programme.desc: Vinny velger mellom to grupper jenter. Siden Angelina er borte vil Snooki at hun og Jenni skal skvære opp med Sam. Gleden blir kortvarig for Snooki, når Mike blir stadig mer fiendtlig.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Deja Vu All Over Again
programme.desc: Alle er frustrerte over Mike - han får gjengen sparket ut av en klubben, får bilen tauet vekk, brenner nesten ned huset og svikter Pauly. To ganger.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back into the Fold
programme.desc: Pauly og Vin har sine siste dater med Miami-jentene, mens Sam og Ron raskt havner i krangel. Jenni lager bråk mellom Pauly og Mike, og det blir en siste kveld full av drama i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back to the Shore
programme.desc: Gjengen er tilbake for enda en vill sommer på Jersey-kysten! Angelina er borte, og Snooki har med seg vennen Deena. Spenningen mellom jentene etter Miami eksploderer den første kvelden.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: It's Gonna Be an Interesting Summer
programme.desc: Konflikten mellom Sammi og JWoww skaper spenning i huset. Ronnie og Sammi isolerer seg og går glipp av første familiemiddag. Men når Ronnie bestemmer seg for å henge med resten av gjengen, føler Sammi seg helt alene.
programme.sub-title: It's Gonna Be an Interesting Summer

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Where's the Beach
programme.desc: Sammi vil slutte fred med Snooki og Deena. JWoww møter eksen Roger. Snooki blir arrestert for drikking på offentlig sted.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Snooki
programme.desc: Snooki er deprimert etter å ha blitt arrestert, helt til hun treffer en ny gutt. Deena treffer Ronnies stuntmann. JWoww og Tom slår opp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Drunk Punch Love
programme.desc: Ronnie og JWoww slutter fred, og Sammi slår til Ronnie. Vinny møter en jente med overlegen familie. Og Mike avslører Deenas lille hemmelighet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Should We Just Break Up?
programme.desc: Ronnies drikking gir smertefulle bivirkninger. Snooki treffer en gutt som kanskje eller kanskje ikke er forlovet. Pauly slutter fred med en gammel fiende.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Cabs Are Here!
programme.desc: Ronnie og Sammis stormfulle forhold er over. Ronnie ødelegger alt Sammi eier, og hun må bestemme seg for om hun skal forlate gjengen.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 202
programme.desc: Erik Lundman i Lundmans transportfirma sliter med en kloakktank, postbud Stephanie gjør en feil og taper tid under en hastetur, og spesialtransportør Jari får utrolig nok tre punkteringer.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 203
programme.desc: Jesper er bekymret for å komme for sent til avlastningen i Danmark. Tove får en dårlig start på dagen og krasjer med tømmerbilen sin. Og Jari havner i feil havn under lossing.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 204
programme.desc: Louise har en uvanlig tung forsendelse med to ismaskiner som skal fraktes til en ishockeybane utenfor Stockholm. Robin, som kjører biler verdt millioner, har en kjøretur med en veldig fin Cobra fra 1965.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 305
programme.desc: I Kristinehamn i Sverige er Jörgen i ferd med å laste en 135 tonn tung barktønne da et høyt smell stopper lasteprosessen. Spylebilsjåføren Magnus og kollegaen Bruno sjekker et overvannsrør.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 401
programme.desc: Å finne frem i skogen er lettere sagt enn gjort. For den nyankomne tømmerbilsjåføren Linda betyr det at hun kommer på etterskudd i et allerede stramt tidsskjema.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 402
programme.desc: I Gøteborg flytter spesialtransportøren Jonathan campinghytter, og været er ikke på hans side. I Stockholm er rotter et problem, og Max, en søppelmann, vil helst slippe å møte dem.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 403
programme.desc: I Stockholm tømmer Max søppeldunker i kjendistette nabolag. Jörgen transporterer en 25 tonn tung gryte i Skåne, og veien dit er både smal og ujevn.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 404
programme.desc: Spesialtransportøren Johan transporterer 30 meter lange trebjelker. Slamsugeren Magnus tar seg av en pumpegrop, en risikofylt jobb på grunn av de farlige gassene som produseres.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anton kjører en grusknuser oppe i Norrland, og Amanda er på et kloakkrenseanlegg med kranbilen sin for å hjelpe til med å tømme en silo.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 406
programme.desc: Max har byttet ut byluften med skjærgården, og dagens oppdrag er å tømme søppeldunker på Ingarö. To termoser med kaffe og Emanuel er klar for en hel dag i skogen.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 407
programme.desc: Ingenting kan gå galt når Jörgen kjører en 70 tonns kran fra Värnamo til Helsingborg. Mickan kjører tømmer for første gang. Olivia transporterer kalver, men kalvene rømmer!

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 408
programme.desc: Mattias kjører over 100 kviger og okser til beite. Tove laster tømmer i skogene i Småland. Jörgen kjører en transformator, men alt fungerer ikke som det skal!

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 501
programme.desc: Jörgen kjører en 50 tonns transformator i Skåne – men problemene avløser hverandre. Mattias har reist til den finske grensen for å frakte alpakkaer. Emina leverer fisk i Skåne.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 502
programme.desc: Pappa Roine og Mattias laster høyballer – men plutselig stopper hjullasteren. Linda leverer drinker rundt i Stockholm – og benytter anledningen til å besøke forloveden Magnus. Piraten legger asfalt.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 503
programme.desc: Biltransportøren Robin må være ekstra forsiktig når han skal frakte en dyr Lincoln på lasteplanet! Det samme gjelder Micke som skal kjøre et dyrt spabad til Uddevalla.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 504
programme.desc: Tove kjører tømmer i Småland – og møter fans midt i skogen. Slamsugeren Magnus skal tømme et basseng på et renseanlegg. Kranfører Amanda er på et vindkraftverk på Gotland – men risikerer å miste båten.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 505
programme.desc: Elin sparker dagen i gang i Stockholm med komplisert lossing og tidspress. Tim kjører etsende last – og han må derfor være ekstra forsiktig på veiene. Peo sliter med containerne sine i Åre.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 506
programme.desc: Vi følger yrkessjåførene som jobber døgnet rundt for å levere forskjellige typer av varer over hele landet - og for å utføre viktige samfunnstiltak som holder Sverige i gang, fra nord til sør.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 507
programme.desc: Vi følger yrkessjåførene som jobber døgnet rundt for å levere forskjellige typer av varer over hele landet - og for å utføre viktige samfunnstiltak som holder Sverige i gang, fra nord til sør.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 508
programme.desc: Johannes skal levere brakker – men kaster ved et uhell nøklene på taket. Spesialtransportørene og ekteparet Anton og Angelica har en kjøretur sammen - til Norge. Emina kjører kjøtt i Skåne.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: One girl finally wins the very real opportunity to be a top model.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Becomes America's Next Top Model

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Overslept
programme.desc: - The competition begins when the finalists land on New York City’s largest naval ship for a surprise fashion show featuring themselves.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Floats Like A Butterfly And Stings Like A Bee
programme.desc: - The Girl’s smooth walk on the runway leads to some rough talking about the house and causes a fight.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Floats Like A Butterfly And Stings Like A Bee

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Can Cry At The Drop Of A Hat
programme.desc: - Top model wannabes face their greatest fears as they undergo extraordinary makeovers and compete in an adventurous photo shoot.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Can Cry At The Drop Of A Hat

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Needs Six Months Of Modeling School
programme.desc: - Top model wannabes face the toughest criticisms.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Needs Six Months Of Modeling School

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Is A Visual Orgasm
programme.desc: - A competitor’s bad attitude comes under attack during a group session to explore personalities
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Is A Visual Orgasm

programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Is Dripping With Hypocrisy

programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Is Afraid Of Snakes

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Cheated
programme.desc: - A night of passion in the romantic city of Milan leads to consequences.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Is America’s Next Top Model
programme.desc: - As the competition comes to a close, the three finalists try to remain composed as they face increased pressure and only one will triumph.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Is America’s Next Top Model

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Fierce rivalries form as the finalists head into the competition full force.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The new model wannabes are whisked away to Jamaica for a sexy swimsuit shoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: One of the models confides to another about her eating disorder only to have that trust broken and her secret shared.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Experts stress health and physical fitness with the models, and a nasty incident involving two of the girls and some baked goods leads to confrontation and a divided house.

programme.desc: One model shares a playful kiss with another, and some of the girls become frantic after getting lost while en route to see New York's top fashion designers.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Forgot Her Shoes

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: The return of Gabriela Fundora, as she sought to defend her undisputed flyweight titles against Alexas Kubicki.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: London played host to George Liddard against reigning British and Commonwealth champion Kieron Conway.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Oil Change / Whiplash
programme.desc: After being instructed to change the oil in the fryer at Burger World, Beavis and Butt-head get the oil from a local gas station. / In an attempt to collect some big insurance money, Butt-head tries to give Beavis a whiplash injury while riding the school

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Candy Sale / To the Rescue
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head sell chocalate bars for their school. Well, the chocolate bars practically sell themselves. / Beavis and Butt-head witness a plane crash and appear in a cheesy reenactment on "Rescue 911."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery
programme.desc: The school closes and makes the best day / Butt-Head phones in a mail-order bride / Burger World launches a home delivery service
programme.sub-title: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Stewart is Missing / Yard Sale
programme.desc: Mrs. Stevenson shows up at Butt-head's house, desperate to enlist their help in finding Stewart. / Tom Anderson get Beavis and Butt-head to watch his yard sale, and the boys manage to sell everything when they take the sale inside.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Tainted Meat / Bad Dog
programme.desc: Beavis and his bacteria ridden "thingy" contaminate the food at Burger World. / Beavis and Butt-head adopt a vicious dog at a shelter and it trains them.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Crisis line / Career day
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head set out to support callers on a crisis line / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head come to the aid of a wounded baby bird...almost. / Beavis and Butt-head show up at an AA meeting hoping to score some booze.
programme.sub-title: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nektet service / Balleskvis
programme.desc: Beavis prøver yogabukser og får dem ikke av. / Guttene oppdager at de har rett til å nekte service til kunder på Burger World.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to stay awake all night, in an attempt to discover the secret behind morning wood. / For his oral report on an historical figure, Beavis recounts the valuable lessons he learned one night while eating at Burger World.
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: En spirituell reise
programme.desc: Beavis ser ansiktet til Jesus i en nacho-chips. Det sender ham på en episk reise for å finne svar på det store spørsmålet - "Hvorfor får jeg aldri pult?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Nose Bleed / Vaya Con Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head tries some sadistic home remedies in an attempt to stop Beavis's nosebleed. / When Beavis turns into Cornholio in Burger World, Immigration Officials take him in as a possible illegal alien and try to make sense of his gibberish.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head explore the career possibilities in selling blood. / While causing mischief at a drive-in movie theatre, Beavis & Butt-head experience a new phase of the moon.
programme.sub-title: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)
programme.desc: Suffering from nasty colds, Beavis & Butt-head visit a doctor in hopes of glomming a prescription remedy. / Beavis & Butt-head's school assignment is to write a poem in the venerated Haiku format.
programme.sub-title: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Figure Drawing / Date Bait
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get to look at real nudes. / The return of Lolita and Tanqueray! Beavis and Butt-head go on their first date, well, almost.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: To teite menn / Fredagsgalskap
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head oppfyller sin samfunnsplikt som jurymedlemmer./ Beavis og Butt-Head tror feilaktig at de har byttet kropp.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Car Wash / Kidnapped
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head attempt to make some money washing cars. / Beavis & Butt-head decide that kidnapping Stewart would be a quick way to some cash.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Politically Correct / True Crime
programme.desc: To better understand their female classmates, Beavis & Butt-head must get in touch with their feelings. Huh huh, he said "touch." / Beavis & Butt-head unknowingly star in their favorite crime reenactment shows.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap
programme.desc: Beavis starts mimicing Butt-Head / A quiet day in Highland, Texas / Our duo enrolls in a fitness class
programme.sub-title: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Scared Straight / Citizen Butt-head Part 2
programme.desc: To teach them that crime doesn't pay, Beavis & Butt-head's principal sends them to prison for a day. Bad idea. / Beavis & Butt-head and President Clinton explore chaos theory together.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sporting goods / Cow tipping
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head decide to get athletic gear supporters for gym class / The duo venture out on a quest for cow tipping

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den rare jenta / Tidsreisen
programme.desc: Beavis møter en hemmelig beundrer på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head krysser frem og tilbake over delstatslinjen inn i Mountain Time Zone og tror de kan reise i tiden.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Manners Suck / Pipe Of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Van Driessen gives his class a lesson in manners that no one will ever forget. He punches out the etiquette teacher. / Butt-head gets stuck in a construction site pipe, a la Baby Jessica.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nyren / Den gode handling
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis ødelegger nyren og en donor fra hans fortid redder dagen./ Beavis og Butt-Head utfører sin første gode gjerning ved å ha DDT i bowlen på skoledansen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head miss the schoolbus home / The duo makes a Late Night Show / Beavis and Butt-Head are invited to play football
programme.sub-title: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Tak / Elv
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head blir sittende fast på taket av Tom Andersons hus./ Beavis og Butt-Head seiler på dekk i en elv og ender opp på sjøen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Crush / Young, Gifted & Crude
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head want to hang with a "really cool' bunch of delinquents. / Beavis & Butt-head spend some time with the school's gifted class. Not much time.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Choke / Career day
programme.desc: Eating chicken can be hazardous / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support
programme.desc: After the Manager explains that Workers Compensation pays you for getting injured on the job, Butt-head sets out to injure Beavis / A Vampire craze hits the high school / Beavis and Butt-Head misinterpret what it means to ask a man for his daughter's hand
programme.sub-title: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Killing Time / Dude, a Reward
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head's worst fears are realized when they have to kill two hours, until something good comes on TV. / Images of Beavis and Butt-head grace the walls of a photo gallery after they find a lost camera and put it to creative use.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Teen Talk / vs.the Vending Machine
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head join Captain Dick Jackman on his Sunday morning program, "rapping" about their problems. / The vending machine wins.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Fluktrommet/Den viktige
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å løse Fluktromgåten, bare for å bli fanget på badet. / Beavis møter sin største helt - Ild.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Snille Butt-Head/ Hjemmehjelp
programme.desc: Butt-Head får medisin for sin aggresjon mot Beavis og blir litt for snill./ Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head går tom for ølpenger, så Beavis må finne seg en jobb.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies
programme.desc: Our duo find out that accidents can lead to money / Beavis and Butt-Head get annoyed at a fly / After a beating by Todd, they become best friends over beer
programme.sub-title: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Virtuelt vannvidd / Utestengt
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head tar på seg solbriller og tror de er virtual reality-briller./ Beavis og Butt-Head blir låst ute av huset og ødelegger det når de prøver å komme seg inn.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Radio Sweethearts / The Great Cornholio
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day. / During a sugar rush, Beavis' alter ego appears. He reeks havoc at Highland High looking for "teepee for his bunghole."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Murder Site / Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Beavis can't take Butt-head's verbal abuse anymore, and snaps while they're checking out the site of a local murder. / Beavis and Butt-head sue Kimberly for sexual harassment, since she's giving them wood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Ding-Dong-Ditch / Head lice / Nothing happening
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head have trouble with a prank / The duo try to cure their scratchy heads / A quiet day in Highland, Texas

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Cyber-Butt / Citizens arrest / Pierced
programme.desc: The school PC gets internet and Stewart helps out friends surf the net / An armed robbery has hilarious consequence / Beavis and Butt-Head get beaten up and inspired to get their ears pierced

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Når DCC-direktøren Kelli Finglass gir en tidligere deltaker en utrolig sjanse til å delta på treningsleiren tre uker etter starten, er det mye å ta igjen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: Hun er tilbake! Den beryktede Kitty Carter kommer til Valley Ranch for å undervise DCCene i teknikk. Deretter skal Charlotte Jones Anderson guide en gruppe cheerleadere på en privat tur rundt Cowboys Stadium.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: Kelli og Judy må ta tøffe beslutninger som er rettferdige, men vonde. Det er oppgjørets time for de gjenværende treningsleir-kandidatene, da det bare er to repetisjoner igjen før den siste elimineringen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 1
programme.desc: For første gang er det det praktfulle Cowboys-stadionet i Texas som er basen for Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-uttaket. Over 600 aspiranter med drømmer om å komme på 2010-2011 DCC-laget ankommer før soloppgang for innledningsrunden.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: De 47 nye jentene som skal delta på DCC-finaleuttaket har hatt to uker til å forberede seg, men er de klare til å danse sammen med de 27 tilbakevendende DCC-veteranene?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 3
programme.desc: DCC Training Camp begynner i kveld! Treningsleir-kandidatene ankommer Valley Ranch for første gang og får muligheten til å møte sine idoler og mentorer - DCC-veteranene.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 4
programme.desc: I den andre uken av treningsleiren vil noen av aspirantene bli sendt hjem. Noen få utvalgte veteraner skal filme et segment for Good Morning America, og de hjelper til med å virkeliggjøre en livslang drøm for en heldig dame.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 5
programme.desc: Uke fire av treningsleiren begynner med at nykommerne får en DCC-"makeover". Fra hår og sminke til selvbruning og tannbleking, blir aspirantene forvandlet til DCC-representanter.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Slutten på treningsleiren nærmer seg og DCC-portretter står på planen. Treningsleir-aspirantene og -veteranene er klare for sine nærbilder, kledd i spesialsydde DCC-drakter og med feilfritt hår og sminke.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: 2010 Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-troppen skal kunngjøres i løpet av de neste to dagene. Det sier seg selv at det er en stressende tid for treningsleir-aspirantene. Tiden er inne for å imponere.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: 34 nykommere og veteraner møter opp i drakten for å ta gruppebildet. Men gledens dag dempes av at direktøren og koreografen til Dallas Cowboy Cheerleaders ennå ikke har offisielt kunngjort 2010-troppen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Prøvedansingen begynner
programme.desc: Cowboys stadion i Arlington i Texas blir nok en gang stedet for prøvedansingen til Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders. 500 kandidater drømmer om å komme med i DCC-kvalifiseringen 2011-2012 DCC før soloppgang.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: På banen
programme.desc: Det storslagne Cowboys stadion er stedet for DCCs avsluttende prøvedansing. Presset blir høyt for 69 nye jenter når 18 DCC-veteraner deltar i den ettertraktede invitasjonen til treningsleiren.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Treningsleiren
programme.desc: DCCs treningsleir begynner på Valley Ranch i kveld! De nye kandidatene stresser påtagelig foran treningsleiren mens de kjemper for å endre planene og sikre nye boformer i Dallas.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Den brømte uniformen
programme.desc: To uker inn i treningsleiren, forbereder Kelli og Judy sin første opptreden. Ukens øvelser er viktige for alle jentene. De forventes å beherske de verdensberømte DCC-sparkene og splitthoppene.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Fornyelse
programme.desc: På treningsleirens tredje uke blir nybegynnerne DCC-fornyet. Hår og sminke blir piffet opp når de blir støpt i DCC-formen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Portrettfotografering
programme.desc: Kveldens øvelser begynner med et smell da teknisk sjef for DCC, Kitty Carter, kommer på overraskende besøk til Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Feltøvelse
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders er to uker unna første omgang, og DCC-sjefen Kelli McGonagill Finglass og koreografen Judy Trammel er presset for at de skal klare utvelgingen og offentliggjøre laget.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Finale
programme.desc: Alt fører frem til treningsleirens avsluttende finalekveld. I kveld fødes og knuses drømmer. Kelli overrasker jentene ved å ta dem til Cowboys' øvingsfelt for å se dem opptre.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Innledende prøvedansing
programme.desc: Under to timer vises sesongpremieren av Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: 600 håpefulle kandidater vil være med på laget, og ankommer Cowboys' stadion for Dallas Cowboys' heiagjengs innledende prøvedansing.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Treningsleir
programme.desc: Treningsleiren starter og mange nye kandidater må bli rotløse og flytte til Dallas. Imidlertid er det ingen garanti for å klare treningsleiren og bli med i Dallas Cowboys' heiagjeng.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Splitthopp
programme.desc: Det er bare andre uke med øvelser, og Kelli og Judy kjører raskt kandidatene gjennom signaturbevegelsene. Mange nye kandidater har aldri foretatt et splitthopp, og uerfarenheten gjør at visse blir skadet.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Fornyelse
programme.desc: Under treningsleirens fjerde uke blir nybegynnerne DCC-fornyet. Kelli Finglass sumfarer nye frisyrer og et sminkeprogram som skal gi jentene DCC-stilen.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 12
programme.desc: At Barnsley Casualty the team clock on to a backlog of patients waiting to be transferred to wards. With no beds across the entire hospital, Sister Jane Hawksworth is battling to prevent patients being on trolleys for the NHS maximum of 12 hours.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 13
programme.desc: After an extraordinarily busy few days, the team at Barnsley Casualty are struggling to clear the backlog of patients, and new arrivals are waiting up to 5 hours to see a doctor.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 14
programme.desc: Sister Jane Hawksworth is on duty, ‘I think the sister team is strong, we are all strong women.' Sister Benita Wainwright heads to Resus where paramedics rush in a 14-year-old girl having a prolonged epileptic seizure.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 15
programme.desc: It’s been a busy night at Barnsley Hospital’s Casualty Department, so the corridors are already packed full of patients when Sister Benita Wainwright arrives to head the shift.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 16
programme.desc: In charge today at Barnsley Hospital’s Casualty Department is Consultant Doctor Julian Humphrey, ‘Emergency departments may look very chaotic but there’s a reasonable amount of structure. It’s organized chaos!’

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 17
programme.desc: Barnsley Casualty is facing one of its toughest shifts to date. With no children’s beds available across the whole of Yorkshire and a department filling up with poorly children the hospital is under pressure.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 18
programme.desc: Registrar Doctor Gemma Hartshorne prepares to treat a man who has suddenly lost all feeling in his foot. Loss of blood flow is turning Roger's foot white - urgent treatment is needed to prevent amputation.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 19
programme.desc: Trainee Advanced Nurse Practitioner Chantelle Proctor assesses a 49-year-old man rushed in by ambulance. Philip, who has a heart condition, collapsed at home and has been vomiting for the last ten days.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 20
programme.desc: While people enjoy a most wonderful time of the year, Barnsley Hospital Casualty is open for business as usual, and the team are getting into the Christmas spirit. Consultant Doctor Julian Humphrey is leading the festive shift.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 1
programme.desc: While Sister Jane runs outside to help a critical patient in the car park, Matron Val and Consultant Doctor Dave Walker need to negotiate with the Police who are stopping new arrivals entering the building.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: Junior Doctor Tom Fish’s first patient is 18-year-old Lewis who has broken bones and deep wounds from a moped accident - but causing him the most pain is his fear of needles.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 3
programme.desc: Sister Benita is running the shift, when suddenly, a fire alarm goes off and she must prepare the entire department - staff and emergency patients - for a full evacuation.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 4
programme.desc: Sister Harriet spots Terry waiting in the queue and decides he needs urgent care. He’s fallen off a roof and is unable to move his arm from a position above his head.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 5
programme.desc: Priority is being given to two patients fighting for breath: 72-year-old Lynda and 2-year-old Seb. Junior Doctor Emma Faragher is treating Lynda. ‘Not being able to breathe is absolutely terrifying,’ says Doctor Faragher.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 6
programme.desc: Consultant Doctor Julian Humphrey looks after a 76-year-old woman who has come in after a nasty fall. She has broken her nose but Doctor Humphrey fears that bleeding on the brain could have much more serious long-term consequences.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 7
programme.desc: Doctor Carson’s caseload also includes Wayne, who was found with head injuries at the bottom of a flight of stairs, and 4-year-old Pippa who’s been brought in with severe sickness.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 8
programme.desc: As winter hits, the cold weather causes a spike in admissions at Barnsley Hospital. And for the casualty team those no letup in the blue light arrivals. Carole is rushed in after being found collapsed outside her home.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 9
programme.desc: It’s all change at Barnsley Casualty as a new system is introduced. Sister Benita is taking on the role of Team Leader for the first time, ‘Being in charge is nice,’ says Benita.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 10
programme.desc: The department is full and waiting time to see a doctor has doubled but ambulances are still bringing in critically ill patients.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 9
programme.desc: What happens when a hoarder can no longer live safely in their home and the family are left to pick up the pieces? House clearance experts Ange and Yvonne have been called in by the daughters of a lifelong hoarder to clear their dad’s house.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode we meet 63-year-old Jane, a retired nurse from Southeast London. Jane’s inability to start a family brought on her hoarding tendencies and 27 years later, her 2 bedroomed terrace home is full to the rafters with furniture and books.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 1
programme.desc: In this brand-new series of Dirty Home Rescue, Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Toni from Telford whose house is so dirty her partner of 10 years, Rich, won’t move in with her.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 2
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Bill and Antionette from Newport, who share their home with their 3 cats. They admit they’ve not deep cleaned their home since they moved in.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 3
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of married couple Lynne and Keith from Chudleigh in South Devon whose house hasn’t had a deep clean since they moved in nearly 20 years ago.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: From the outside 69-year-old Barbara’s house in Braintree looks like any other on the street, but she wasn’t always a hoarder, as the tragic deaths of her husband and son sent her life spiraling out of control.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: In West London, former exotic dancer Dione’s flat is bursting at the seams with a lifetimes collection of memorabilia and hand me down relics. Help is at hand as deep cleaning arrive to clear the hoard.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: In the South Wales Valleys, 42-year-old Phillip has it all, he runs a successful business, he’s in a long-term relationship, he owns his own home and... he has a rat infested, humongous hoard.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 12
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Alan, a sound therapist who has lived on his own for 20 years. His son has tried to help him clean, but it’s a battle he’s never been able to win.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 4
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Anita from Manchester, who’s house is overrun with her 3 cats who make a mess wherever they like.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 5
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Scout Leader and Single mum of two; Debbie from South London, whose 2-bed flat is drowning in clutter and filth.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: Hoarding is on the rise and it's believed that 1 in 20 people could have a problem. With over 1.2 million problem hoarders in the UK today, one could be your neighbour?

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: Susan's hoard has made her virtually homeless. Brian has dedicated his life to hoarding and his daughter is sick of it. Jake is lucky to be alive as his home almost burned to the ground in an inferno fuelled by the clutter he'd collected.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: Arthur's flat is packed with junk. Experts Caz and Tee are up for their toughest assignment ever. Khim is getting married but first she must clear her hoard. Mandi's passion for vintage clothes is out of control.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: Esther's hoard is so bad her landlord told her to clear up or clear out. Nigel receives a visit from fellow hoarder Janice.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 5
programme.desc: Paul's hoard fills his whole house, room after room after room is buried under 6 feet of clutter.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 9
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Sue from Oxford whose house is overflowing with possessions. Sue married the love of her life in 2015, and he moved in, bringing everything he owned with him.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 10
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Linda and husband Andy from Bedau in South Wales whose house is overrun with animals and hasn’t been cleaned in 4 years.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 11
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Joanna from Birmingham, whose 2-bedroom flat is overflowing with possessions. Joanna works two jobs, leaving her no time to look after her home.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: In the picturesque city of Bath, Paul’s cottage is bursting at the seams with a lifetime’s collection of junk. Known locally as ‘boot cottage’ - because everything Paul owns and wears comes from car boot sales - every room is a no-go zone.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: When a car crashes into a river, Steve and the team are in deep water attempting to pull it out. Jim has to recover a van that has got wedged on top of a garden wall. And Fluff is picking up an army truck for a friend of the boss.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: On a busy rural road in Essex, recovery op Steve Knight battles rush hour traffic to get his recovery vehicle around the narrow roads to get to a 7.5-ton lorry down a ditch. Recovery op Rory has to deliver a dodgy van to a scrapyard.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: Lantern's only female driver Merrie is tasked with the removal of an abandoned lorry which it turns out has been used as a mobile home, and inside she discovers all its guilty secrets.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: When a skip lorry breaks down on the M1, Recovery stalwart Rory has to risk life and limb to get it recovered. Jim has a happy reunion with his own truck - but the smile is quickly wiped off his face when he has to pick up a mangled mail truck!

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: Recovery op Jim Howard is dispatched to a serious incident. A van has collided with an artic forcing the vehicles behind to brake suddenly resulting in a major pile up. Recovery op Marta is struggling to collect an artic from a lorry graveyard.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: Recovery Ops Marta and Pat have to pull a bin lorry out of a muddy ditch - luckily, they have a specialized off-road vehicle that is just the tool for the job. Recovery drivers Roman and Nick have to deliver an antique tank worth 20 grand to a buyer.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: When a tanker carrying highly corrosive pure sulphuric acid smashes into the central reservation of a busy A road and overturns, Recovery Experts Jim and Steve rush to the scene and immediately call for backup.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: Some of Crouch's finest are joined by Lantern Recovery's female operative Merrie at a bus depot. The owners lost 10 of their school coaches to a devastating fire and now need the burned-out shells removed in order to bring in a new fleet.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: There's no rest for recovery operators and this time it's all hands to the pump as several of Crouch's finest are joined by Lantern Recovery's female operative Merrie at a bus depot in Tamworth.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: A 44-ton food lorry is on fire, putting motorists in grave danger. Steve Kelly and his team need to get it shifted off the road as quickly as possible, making this one of the most dangerous jobs the team has ever encountered.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: Crouch Ops Rob and Lee race to the scene of a horrific traffic collision where a van has slid out of control on a country lane and landed on top of a car. With the car wedged underneath the van, the recovery team is faced with a complex challenge.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: Incident Manager Steve and the team are called out to upright an artic that's rolled over on the A1. With rush hour fast approaching, the boys need to raise the heavyweight payload before they cause traffic mayhem.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: Crane Operator Nick cannot find a 4x4 that has taken the term 'off road' to another level on the busy A10 and is buried on its side in a water-filled ditch. Once it's discovered he is forced to stop his truck in a live lane to winch it out.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: Recovery op Tez has to fly to a job. After a birdstrike, a 44-ton artic needs rescuing from the side of the busy A1 dual carriageway, one of the UK's deadliest roads. Double act, Stig and Lee need to shift a totaled tractor with a busted axle.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Incident Manager Steve is sent to coordinate a recovery on the Northbound A1 after a collision that has closed both lanes. With a Bin Lorry on its side in a ditch and a truck pulling a refrigerated container rolled over, this is a major job.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: On the M1, Crouch incident manager, Steve, and his team face a massive task trying to recover a 26-ton lorry that careened off the motorway, catapulted across a 6-foot ditch, broke through a fence, and landed a shocking 30 meters from the road.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: Steve and the team attempt to rescue an enormous rubble truck that's tipped over in a ditch. Forced to close the road they're up against the clock, but having to work in the dark is making the job a lot more precarious.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: Stig is called out to an oil tanker stuck in the mud in the middle of an isolated farm track. Stig is forced to reverse his massive truck through the surrounding tiny lanes to try and reach the stranded truck from the other side.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Tez and the team get in a jam when they recover a parcel lorry that has taken the term 'stuck in the post' to another level. They have the risky job of getting it shifted before rush hour begins.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En tidlig februarmorgen i Stockholm melder en mann sin kone, Sacha, savnet. Etter hvert som politiet graver i parets fortid, oppdager de et turbulent forhold under den tilsynelatende ryddige overflaten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 204
programme.desc: På kvelden 1. nyttårsdag i 2012 utløses trygghetsalarmen hjemme hos 98 år gamle Hilda Feste. Da hjemmetjenesten rykker ut blir de vitne til en grufull hendelse. Politiet starter umiddelbart opp jakten på gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 403
programme.desc: Marit Ødegaard jobber på en veikro ikke langt fra svenskegrensen. En oktoberdag i 2000 dukker hun ikke opp på jobb. Kort tid etter blir Marit funnet drept i hjemmet sitt

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 604
programme.desc: En 33 år gammel mann blir funnet skutt og drept nær Sundsvall. Det viser seg å være en mann med mange fiender, og politiets liste består i begynnelsen av over femti personer med mulige motiver.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En ung mann blir funnet død på et jorde utenfor Enköping. Ved første øyekast ser det ut som om han har lagt seg ned for å hvile - men når politiet undersøker liket, oppdager de noe som antas å være et skuddsår.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 506
programme.desc: 26. januar 2001 ble Benjamin Hermansen knivstukket til døde som følge av sin hudfarge. Drapet fikk hele landet til å delta i antirasistiske markeringer og protester.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En familie som rammes av en husbrann klarer å unnslippe flammene, men alt de eier har blitt til aske. Det som først ser ut til å være en ulykke, viser seg å være mye mer komplisert.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 105
programme.desc: Tina Jørgensen forsvant etter en kveld på byen i Stavanger. En måned senere finner politiet liket av en 20 år gammel kvinne. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av Tina og deretter dumpet henne langs en øde veistrekning?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 301
programme.desc: Justisminister Tor Mikkel Wara blir i 2018 utsatt for en rekke alvorlige angrep på sitt private hjem. I flere måneder står politiet uten spor, helt til det kommer et sjokkerende gjennombrudd i saken.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 404
programme.desc: I desember 2015 gjør gallerist Reidar Osen et ærend med varebilen sin da han blir kapret av ukjente gjerningsmenn, som truer ham på livet og krever to millioner kroner. Hvem står bak kidnappingen?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 102
programme.desc: Åtte år gamle Monika Sviglinskaja blir funnet død i sitt hjem på Sotra. Politiet mener det dreier seg om et selvmord og henlegger saken. Men moren hennes er fortsatt overbevist om at noe kriminelt har skjedd.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En politietterforskning settes i gang etter at Maud Johansson meldes savnet den 18. oktober 2005. Etter flere år med iherdig leting ser det ut til at etterforskningen stopper opp, men politiet gir ikke opp.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 704
programme.desc: En sommernatt i Värmland bryter det ut slagsmål, hvoretter 21 år gamle Harout mottar et dødelig knivstikk. Politiet får mistanker om at et sjalusidrama kan være nøkkelen til å finne den skyldige.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 504
programme.desc: En sommernatt i 2001 er Gunn Merete Lode på vei hjem etter et venninnetreff i Bryne. I nabolaget sitt blir hun overfalt av en ukjent mann. Situasjonen bli observert av 17 år gamle Øyvind.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 702
programme.desc: Ekteparet Suzanne og Lars lever et stille og rolig liv på landet utenfor Stockholm. Men når Suzanne avlyser en viktig tenniskamp på kort varsel, blir hennes tennispartner mistenksom og varsler politiet.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Da 32 år gamle Memo plutselig forsvinner, tar vennene hans saken i egne hender og begynner å lete desperat etter ham. Bekymringen forvandles til frykt når letingen fører til urovekkende oppdagelser.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Natt til 13. februar 2023 rystes den lille bygda Malå i Nord-Sverige av et brutalt angrep. Etter hvert som politiet begynner å nøste opp i saken, dukker det opp mørke hemmeligheter og mistanker mot uventede personer.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 603
programme.desc: Politiet har ikke gitt opp å oppklare dobbeltdrapet i Linköping. Etter en endring i svensk lov i 2019, har politiet nå muligheten til å bruke kommersielle slektsdatabaser for å finne gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 304
programme.desc: I august 2004 stormer to bevæpnede personer inn i Munch-museet på Tøyen. I kaoset som oppstår tar de med seg de to verdenskjente maleriene Skrik og Madonna. Hvem står bak tyveriet, og er bildene tapt for alltid?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 706
programme.desc: I mai 2017 ble småbarnsfaren Filip Viking funnet skutt i Katrineholm. Vitner skynder seg bort til ham og i forbindelse med forsøkene på å redde Filips liv, klarer de å se en lang svartkledd mann løpe fra åstedet.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy: Red Alert
programme.desc: Pit Bull Buddy, was found chained and starving to death and was very aggressive. Rufus, a Rottweiler/Shar Pei mix, has bitten five people. Both need to get their aggression under control.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: The Dark Side of Chipper
programme.desc: Chipper, a 2-month old Ridgeback/Boxer mix has become progressively more aggressive and has attacked 5 dogs. Two Whippets, Rudy and Monte, are causing issues at their owner’s place of business.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: A pet groomer gets rave reviews but needs Cesar's help with handling some difficult clients. A Chihuahua makes a lot of noise, causing chaos with her cohabiters. Can Cesar install calm in the pack?

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Nuna & Kane
programme.desc: NuNu the Chihuahua, fiercely attacks anyone who comes near his owner Tina. NuNu’s total opposite, Kane the Great Dane, is vehemently afraid of shiny surfaces

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Opie & Flirt
programme.desc: Black lab mix Opie is a charmer around people, but frighteningly aggressive around other dogs. Energetic to the point of being neurotic, Chinese Crested Flirt cannot sit still for one moment.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Rana & Ruby
programme.desc: Scared of everything, Ruby the Vischla deals with her neuroses by biting. At the same time, Rana barks every time bread pops in the toaster, or when the microwave goes off, or when the phone rings.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Josh & Boomer
programme.desc: Josh, a Maltese, will not let anyone with a brush or pair of scissors near him without putting up a fight. Boomer, a Chesapeake Bay Retriever, barks incessantly and refuses to come out of the pool.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Harry & Brooks
programme.desc: Harry wants to charge after anything with wheels, including passing cyclists, rollerbladers or skateboarders. Brooks, an Entlebucher, is constantly chasing after light, he is never calm.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Coach & Sueki
programme.desc: Coach, an out of control Boxer, bit a neighbor, seemingly sealing his fate. Coach gets a stay of execution when Cesar Millan comes to the rescue. Sueki refuses to walk on the leash.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Slick & Pepper
programme.desc: Slick, a rare white Puli, is full of phobias. When clients come to Christopher’s photography studio, they are greeted by Pepper’s annoying barking and heel nipping.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Ava & Gus
programme.desc: Ava, a Pug/Pekingese swiftly twirls for all occasions, possibly a neurological condition Cesar cannot treat. Gus the Bouvier greets people by throwing his 100 pound body at them.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Maya & Churchill
programme.desc: Churchill the Rottweiler is a well mannered dog, except when around other animals. Meanwhile, Maya, an affable Pit Bull, insists on being intimately involved in all operations of the household.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bubba & Garrett
programme.desc: Heidi Wasserman inherited Bubba, a spoiled Maltese that demands to be taken everywhere and nips at anyone who tries to leave. Garrett, a German Shepherd, chases his tail, obsessively.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Emily
programme.desc: Emily, a Pit Bull, has become every owner’s worst nightmare – extremely aggressive towards other dogs. She’s so out of control, only Cesar Millan’s 6-week boot camp can turn her behavior around.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Hank & Paris
programme.desc: Marsha Alexander’s rescued Mastiff has ruined the furniture and intimidates anyone walking by his gate. Paris, a long hair Chihuahua, looks fashionable, but barks and snaps at strangers.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sasha & Shep
programme.desc: Lhasa Apso Sasha, bares her teeth at anyone who takes anything from her. White German Shepherd, “Shep,” goes after strangers, making it impossible for his wheelchair bound owner to control.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Jake & King
programme.desc: Jake tends to mind his owner Bob but goes crazy to protect Bob’s wife Linda. At the same time, all of 10 year old Chantel’s might is hardly enough for 150 pound King to even take notice.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Scrawny & Lola
programme.desc: Scrawny, one of nine Yorkies, is Allen’s favorite, but attacks anyone that comes near. Lola, a Dalmatian, barks at everything. Find out how Cesar reestablishes control in both homes.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: J & Alice
programme.desc: J is unpredictable and aggressive and his owner is now dealing with a lawsuit. Alice is depressed and aggressive towards the other two dogs in the house – a potentially lethal combination.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Caper & Julius
programme.desc: Caper has a lot of energy, particularly when it comes to chasing down balls non-stop. Julius is a four-year-old Pit Bull mix that is frightened of everything.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bella & Jordan
programme.desc: “Bella Angel” is a devil in disguise. She bites anyone who comes near the house or the family. Jordan, an English Bulldog, jumps up and down, licks people incessantly and is obsessed by skateboards.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sunshine & Teddy
programme.desc: Sunshine is a champion Doberman in the show ring but far too aggressive in the street. Teddy, a yellow lab, has bitten its owner twice, and has attacked more than one stranger.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Goldie & Pepsi
programme.desc: Pepsi, a German Shepherd, becomes intensely aggressive around cats. Goldie, the beautiful Brittany Spaniel of “General Hospital” star Jacklyn Zeman that has become aggressive towards female dogs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Nicki
programme.desc: Nicky, a 4-year old black Rottweiler, suffered terribly in his youth. His new owner has given him a loving home. However, there are a few old habits he can’t shake, including dog aggression.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Percy & Justice
programme.desc: Percy, a West Highland White Terrier, is a handful, biting anyone who tries to touch his hindquarters. Justice, a Pit Bull, is slowly escalating toward dangerous aggression.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Stewart & Buddy
programme.desc: Stewart, a Chow/Golden Retriever mix, barks and growls at and seems to be fearful and aggressive toward children. Every time Johnny turns on the hose, Buddy the Beagle runs for the house.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Lucy & Lizzie
programme.desc: Lucy the Dalmatian snarls at larger dogs then turns in circles and attacks her own tail. Lizzie, a Red Tick Elizabethan Beagle, is obsessed with running, inside or outside.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sophie & Daisy
programme.desc: Sophie, a Sheltie-Golden nix, tries to nip at the heels of her owner’s horse. Daisy has an annoying problem – she tries to “hump” various members of the Benda family.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Boyfriend & Alfie
programme.desc: “Boyfriend” is a Shephard mix that has repeatedly bitten his owner’s boyfriend. Alfie is the aggressive English Bulldog of popular actress/television host Daisy Fuentes.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Brady, Bandit, and Hootie
programme.desc: Water-obsessed Labrador; a pooch with performance anxiety; a leg chomping Chihuahua.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.title: South Park: Glødhet katolsk kjærlighet
programme.desc: Presten Maxi reiser til Roma da skandalen i den katolske kirken truer med å påvirke antallet kirkegjengere i South Park negativt.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien
programme.desc: South Park tar en 'Cloverfield' med store, mystiske skapninger som herjer rundt i verden og blir fanget opp av Randys kamera.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien 2: Alarmerende
programme.desc: Enorme marsvin angriper byer i hele verden. Guttene har nøkkelen til å redde menneskeheten, men sitter fast i Andesfjellene.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion reiser seg
programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Coon mot Coon og venner
programme.desc: 'The Coon' viser seg å være enda ondere en den mørke mesteren Cthulhu, når han krever hevn over sine tidligere partnere.

programme.title: South Park: Den fattige ungen
programme.desc: Kennys foreldre blir arrestert og han plasseres i fosterhjem - så nå er Cartman det fattigste barnet på skolen! I mellomtiden kommer en mystisk figur fra fortiden tilbake.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Den skumle fisken
programme.desc: Sharon Marshs tante Flo har gaver til Shelly og Stan. Shelly får et flott stereoanlegg, mens Stan får en skummel fisk.

programme.title: South Park: Succubusen
programme.desc: Cartman går til optiker, som gjør narr av Cartmans vektproblemer og kaller ham 'Piggy'.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey, julebæsjen
programme.desc: Borgermesteren vil lage en høytidsfeiring som ikke støter noen, og Kyle tror han har løsningen.

programme.title: South Park: Da Wall-Mart kom til byen
programme.desc: Stan og Kyle prøver å forhindre at Wall-Mart forvandler South Park til en spøkelsesby, men en besatt Cartman står i deres vei.

programme.title: South Park: Fåraktig
programme.desc: Mens han er på en gruppeterapitime mot hamstring, blir Stan fanget i en drøm om skolerådgiveren Mr. Mackey.

programme.title: South Park: Gothbarn 3: posørenes daggry
programme.desc: Goth-ungene sendes på leir for problembarn.

programme.title: South Park: Freemium er ikke gratis

programme.title: South Park: Heksesønner
programme.desc: På den årlige Halloween-sammenkomsten, kaster en heks trolldom som terroriserer alle i South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Råtne tomater
programme.desc: Barna i South Park påstår at de har sett mr. Garrison luske rundt i byen. Folk i byen er sinte fordi presidenten skremmer barna deres.

programme.title: South Park: Sparkesyklene
programme.desc: Ungene planlegger å bruke siste nytt innen forflytning for å skaffe seg mer godteri til halloween enn de har fått noen gang.

programme.title: South Park: Tegridy Farms Halloween Special

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Nor Iron Bars a Cage
programme.desc: Accidentally caught on film, Vincent become the target of a scientist desperate to learn the truth about him.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Song of Orpheus
programme.desc: When Father ventures to the Above World for the first time in decades, he is arrested for murder. Vincent and Catherine must delve into Father's mysterious past to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Dark Spirit
programme.desc: Investigating a mysterious death makes Catherine the target of a voodoo cult.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Watcher
programme.desc: On Vincent and Catherine's two year anniversary, Catherine receives a phone message indicating that someone is watching them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Distant Shore
programme.desc: Catherine heads out to L.A California, to find a witness for an investigation.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Trial
programme.desc: Catherine is put in charge of a murder case in court, and to bring justice to a five year old murdered son.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Kingdom by the Sea
programme.desc: Catherine is blocked out of an investigation involving a murder attempt by the C.I.A. But there are more shocks yet to come, and a familiar face returns.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Hollow Men
programme.desc: Vincent witnesses their latest murder and is unable to stop them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: What Rough Beast
programme.desc: Catherine is attacked in the park by two men disguised as policemen.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ceremony of Innocence
programme.desc: Following the death of investigative reporter, Bernie Spirko, Elliot Burch and Catherine set out to find the man who hired and killed Spirko.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Rest Is Silence…
programme.desc: Following the ordeal with Paracelcus, Vincent moves forward toward a stress-aggravated mental collapse. Vincent continues to come to terms with the beast in himself and finds himself losing control of his thoughts.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Though Lovers Be Lost...
programme.desc: Catherine reaches Vincent in the catacomb and rescues Vincent from his madness. However, as Vincent begins to recover, he realizes he has lost his bond with Catherine and is unable to sense when she is in danger.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Walk Slowly
programme.desc: Following Catherine's death on the rooftop, Vincent takes her back to her apartment and leaves her on her bed.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Nevermore
programme.desc: Vincent has begun his quest to find his son and makes his first move by revealing himself to Elliot.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Snow
programme.desc: The man who killed Catherine and took her baby sends an assassin to get Vincent. He manages to find the underground world and goes looking for him.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Beggar's Comet
programme.desc: Not wanting to put the Tunnel World in further danger, Vincent decides to leave the tunnels and with the death of Snow, Gabriel plots for Vincent's demise.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Time to Heal
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the boat explosion that most likely killed Elliot, Diana is shocked when she encounters a wounded Vincent who collapses on Catherine's grave.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Escape Clause
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Lonely
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Time Enough at Last
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Healer/Children's Zoo/Kentucky Rye
programme.desc: Jackie steals a healing stone but loses his way/A girl's zoo visit transforms her parents' relationship/Bob enters a strange bar post-accident.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Little Boy Lost/Wish Bank/Nightcrawlers
programme.desc: Photographer faces dilemma & encounters familiar boy/Janice gets lamp with wish restrictions/Trooper's diner stop unveils vet's nightmares.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Perchance to Dream
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Judgment Night
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: And When the Sky Was Opened
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…
programme.sub-title: And When the Sky Was Opened

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: What You Need
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ye Gods
programme.desc: Cupid arrives in the modern world. A love spell for his target does not work as well as he hopes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: If She Dies
programme.desc: A year after his wife died a man is involved in a car accident that leaves his young daughter in a coma. On his way home the man has a vision.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Examination Day/A Message From Charity
programme.desc: In the far future, twelve-year-old Dickie must take the government intelligence test/A 16-year old in 1985 finds himself in telepathic contact with a girl in 1700. Her knowledge of the future gets her accused of being a witch.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Four of Us are Dying
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.
programme.sub-title: The Four of Us are Dying

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Third From the Sun
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Shot an Arrow into the Air
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately, they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.
programme.sub-title: I Shot an Arrow into the Air

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hitch-Hiker
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Teacher's Aide/Paladin of the Lost Hour
programme.desc: A teacher on a violent and gang-infested high school has trouble controlling her students/A Vietnam vet named Billy saves an old man named Gaspar from a mugging at a cemetery.
programme.sub-title: Teacher's Aide/Paladin of the Lost Hour

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Act Break/The Burning Man/Dealer's Choice
programme.desc: Landlord pesters Maury, whose partner dies. Maury wishes for Shakespeare as partner, travels back in time/Woman encounters odd hitchhiker/Poker game newcomer raises suspicion with repeated card draws.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Fever
programme.desc: Tight-fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Flight
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. airbase in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Purple Testament
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Elegy
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left--only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Wong's Lost and Found Emporium
programme.desc: David Wong searches for something he lost. He seeks the Lost and Found Emporium where he finds others looking for their lost items.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dead Woman's Shoes
programme.desc: Shy Maddie finds a pair of shoes and after trying them on is possessed by the vengeful spirit of a rich murdered woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Shadow Man/The Uncle Devil Show/Opening Day
programme.desc: Boy finds solace in deal with Shadow Man/Video tricks bewilder parents/Lovers plot in Twilight Zone, facing ironic twist.
programme.sub-title: The Shadow Man/The Uncle Devil Show/Opening Day

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mirror Image
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Monsters are Due on Maple Street
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.
programme.sub-title: The Monsters are Due on Maple Street

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Great Mistake
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a little trouble when she sneaks out of the house after being grounded.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Crucible
programme.desc: Sabrina is put on trial for witchcraft when her class visits historical Salem, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Troll Bride
programme.desc: When Sabrina is tricked into marrying a troll, only a prince – a.k.a. Harvey – can save her.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sabrina's 17th birthday turns stressful when she has to start studying for her witch's license.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 2)
programme.desc: Sabrina learns about the responsibilities that come with using magic when she earns her witch’s learner’s permit.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dummy For Love
programme.desc: Sabrina takes advantage of Vice Principal Kraft’s attraction to Aunt Hilda.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dante’s Inferno
programme.desc: Sabrina learns not to date outside of her realm after a bad evening with a witch boy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Doll’s Story
programme.desc: Babysitting becomes a test of ingenuity when Sabrina’s bratty little cousin turns her into a doll.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Boy
programme.desc: The mysteries of men are revealed when Sabrina poses as a boy to figure out how they think.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It
programme.desc: Halloween is a scary night indeed when Sabrina and her aunts try to throw a normal party
programme.sub-title: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Witch Trash
